title: How to Use Game Passes Effectively in Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - How to Use Game Passes Effectively in Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - How to Use Game Passes Effectively in Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: The Roblox game pass is a very useful and beneficial feature of Roblox that lets creators enhance their offered experiences and monetize them at the same time. A game pass enables exclusive access to additional game functions and features otherwise generally inaccessible.
content_html:
How to Use Game Passes Effectively in Roblox

June 10, 2025 by jose
>
The Roblox game pass is a very useful and beneficial feature of Roblox that lets creators enhance their offered experiences and monetize them at the same time. A game pass enables exclusive access to additional game functions and features otherwise generally inaccessible.

The Roblox game pass is a very useful and beneficial feature of Roblox that lets creators enhance their offered experiences and monetize them at the same time. A game pass enables exclusive access to additional game functions and features otherwise generally inaccessible.


If you're looking to learn more about this, make sure you read our tips on using game passes smartly!


The Game Pass


In the general sense of the word, a game pass is something like a purchased ticket that provides a special privilege(s) and/or add-on(s) within a game. It is a pass to an exclusive section of the game and can be likened to watching a movie on the balcony while the rest of the crowd has to make do on the first floor. Roblox developers can utilize them as a source of added monetization.


Game passes typically provide features like access to VIP or exclusive in-game locations. Extra lives and health boosts, special in-game items or skins, or special powers and abilities like invisibility, super speed, and other in-game player enhancements.


Creating the Roblox game pass


As a Roblox developer, it is important not just to create a game pass (for your players to use) but an effective one at that. Begin by logging into your Roblox account and navigating to the Create section. Click "Create" at the top to access your game management area.


Select the game you want to create the game pass for, and on the left sidebar, click on "Game Passes". You will then have to upload an image that will identify the game pass to your players.


You will have to assign a price for your game pass, and keep in mind that the price will always affect the saleability of your game pass. Once you have a game pass with a price, click "Preview" to review what you made, then finally "Save" to publish your game pass.


This makes your game pass available for Roblox players to purchase, and that is how you can effectively monetize your Roblox game.


Functionality of the Roblox game pass


You will need to make your game pass functional, so you will have to modify or script your game to see and identify the game pass (which the player bought). You will have to assign the feature, add-on, or special privilege that the game pass will give to the purchasing player. As an example, let's say it's a game pass for invisibility.


You will also have to write a Roblox LUA script to provide the game pass holder with what was promised by the game pass. The script must check if the player bought the game pass and if so, grant the ability. For instance, invisibility.


If the game pass has a particular time limit for use, then the script must also have the provision to disable the privilege when the pass is no longer valid. Using the same example, the invisibility effect is gone, and everyone can now see the player.


Test your game to make sure that the script is operational and the game pass will work for those who purchased it when they enter or play your game. However, before attempting to create a Roblox game pass, it is advisable to at least have a good working knowledge of Roblox LUA and the development of gaming scripts.


The effective use of Roblox game pass


Each developer has his/her own strategy on how to maximize the use of game effectively passes with their games. Regardless, here are some general strategies that one can use to optimize the Roblox game pass.


  • Provide really exclusive benefits in exchange for the game pass. Providing very special (if not rare) items and abilities is the best advertising to sell the game pass.

  • Using limited or time-offered game passes will give them the impression of rarity and the one-time sale marketing strategy. Some customers are addicted to this kind of thing, the kind of people who will rush to a Friday or Saturday night commercial sale extravaganza.

  • Advertise or announce your offered game passes in-game so players can see them and know there are special privileges they can avail of.

  • Experiment with the price of the pass and adjust accordingly. Too high, and players either cannot afford it or get turned off. Too low, and you might as well give it as a freebie. Just like cooking, the trick is to get just the right taste.

Making use of these strategies and other useful ones you may encounter will increase the chances of players investing in your game. Also, always monitor player feedback as it will help you improve your game and refine your game pass offerings.


A game pass is something extra for those who took the time, effort, and cost to purchase it. It's a great way to provide extra value to players and fans of your games in exchange for keeping the lights on and maybe even funding your next big game idea. It's the main way for a Roblox developer to monetize their games, and if you're all-in on Roblox, this is a feature you'll want to learn and implement in your games.

title: How to Copy and Customize Uncopylocked Games on Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - How to Copy and Customize Uncopylocked Games on Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - How to Copy and Customize Uncopylocked Games on Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: To help their talented community create their own experiences, Roblox has released several tools and features, and uncopylocked games are one of them.
content_html:
How to Copy and Customize Uncopylocked Games on Roblox

June 7, 2025 by jose
>
To help their talented community create their own experiences, Roblox has released several tools and features, and uncopylocked games are one of them.

One major feature of the Roblox gaming platform which has led to its massive success is the encouragement of its community members to showcase and share their talented creations. To facilitate this, certain tools and features of Roblox have been geared towards these efforts, and uncopylocked games are one of them.



There are several reasons why some Roblox games are uncopylocked - or in simple terms, open for copying and customization. While not every creator chooses to make their game available, those who do often do it with a purpose: to inspire, to educate, and to share their creativity with others.



It’s important to remember that Roblox’s copyright protections are active and respected across the platform. Copying someone’s game without permission or bypassing protections by using glitches or exploits is against Roblox’s Terms of Service and could lead to serious consequences. That said, when a creator chooses to make their game uncopylocked (via the “Allow Copying” setting), it opens a door to endless creative possibilities—for learning, remixing, and even launching your own unique experience.



Let’s dive into how you can responsibly and creatively copy and modify uncopylocked games in Roblox.



Copying games that can be legitimately copied


There are several reasons why there are copyable games on the platform, but three stand out the most.



First, the game may be discontinued, and the creator no longer supports it. Second, magnanimous, open-source-advocating creators usually "Open Source" their creations so that others may benefit from them. Thirdly, they specifically do it for the purpose of educating up-and-struggling newbie creators, providing a valuable learning resource to work with.



For these reasons, and provided the game is genuinely copyable and not because of unauthorized access or any exploitation, then yes, one can freely copy the game.



Copying Steps


Search the platform for a game that you would like to copy and check the game's settings or description. If it is uncopylocked, it should say, "Allow Copying". You can also check out the list of uncopylocked games on RobloxGo as well.



Look for the three dots (...) located usually at the right of the game title and click 'em. This will let you edit the experience in Roblox Studio. With the game in Studio, go to "File" then "Save As" to save a copy of the game to your Roblox Account.



There. You now have a copy of the game to tinker with.



Customizing the uncopylocked games


Now that you have a copy of an uncopylocked game, you can then start to customize it. Be advised that a good working knowledge of Roblox Studio is necessary to be able to move on with this, so learn as much as you can about using the game editor/creator first.



Then, you can move on to modify the game environment (the map) where you can do such things as change the terrain, adjust the lighting, add or remove objects (and other assets), and alter the game's overall atmosphere in any way you want.



If you want to modify the programming of the game or that of any of its assets/objects, you will have to go into the script editor. You will usually find the game's scripts in the explorer window under ServerScriptService, ReplicatedStorage, or another container (you'll have to search for it).



Once you locate the script you want to modify, double-click its name in the Explorer window. It will open up in the script editor, where you can then directly work with the Roblox LUA code.



With the use of both scripting and map modification, you can then redesign and update the game's "User Interface" by changing and/or reprogramming the buttons, levers, pads, and other player interfaces in the game.



With your customization work, you now have a new or modified experience that you can quality test and finally publish to share with the community at large.



The availability of uncopylocked games on the platform facilitates a way to first educate oneself on the ins and outs of Roblox game making and with original creator permission through the uncopylock feature, drastically cut development time by using maps, objects, and other assets one can pull out (copy) from the myriad of uncopylocked games.



Final Reminders


If you're looking to learn how to customize your own game using uncopylocked versions, hopefully, this guide proves to be helpful to you.



That said, please be reminded that Intellectual Property (IP) rights are a big thing in Roblox. Be very careful when you copy games on the platform, and adhere to the ethical guidelines of the Roblox community. Respect the original creator by giving credit where credit is due, and ask permission if you are unsure about the copyright status of game assets on the platform (better to be safe than face possible legal consequences).

title: Brookhaven Secrets: Hidden Locations and Roleplay Tips
image_title: RobloxGo - Brookhaven Secrets: Hidden Locations and Roleplay Tips
image_alt: RobloxGo - Brookhaven Secrets: Hidden Locations and Roleplay Tips - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Just getting started on Brookhaven or, you’re one of the pros? Either way, hop on because we’re diving into some hidden locations and role-play tips for Brookhaven.
content_html:
Brookhaven Secrets: Hidden Locations and Roleplay Tips

June 5, 2025 by Skyrus
>
Just getting started on Brookhaven or, you’re one of the pros? Either way, hop on because we’re diving into some hidden locations and role-play tips for Brookhaven.

You can say what you want about the metaverse, open-world builders, or whatever new sci-fi sandbox rolls in—but Brookhaven RP is still one of the most iconic Roblox experiences ever. It’s not just a town; it’s a vibe. A pixelated playground of gossip, roleplay drama, spontaneous "weddings", and, let’s not forget, secrets. So, if you’ve only ever played house or driven a Lambo to school in it - you’ve barely scratched the surface.

Where the dead don’t rest: the cemetery secret

Now, if you’ve wandered into Brookhaven’s cemetery thinking it’s just a spooky backdrop for vampire roleplays, think again. There’s an actual interactive secret in there. Crouch, click, or jump on the right grave (not telling which—half the fun is hunting), and boom: door opens, mystery unfolds. It’s giving ghost of RP past energy. Inside? A cryptic little hideout perfect for planning your next haunting.

The lake that doesn’t just sparkle: Lake Madison cabin

Lake Madison is not just for romance roleplays and cute selfies with the sun setting in the background. Nope. Hidden inside that cozy little lakeside cabin is a safe. And what’s cooler than a mysterious safe in the middle of nowhere? It’s like Brookhaven's version of a bank heist mission—minus the mission. Tip: bring a buddy and turn it into a treasure hunt story arc. You’ll feel like detective Barbie meets Ocean’s Eleven.

Splash, dive, secret tunnel: the swimming pool secret

You thought the Brookhaven swimming pool was just a spot for awkward birthday parties? Nah. There’s an actual tunnel under there. Hop in the pool, take a dive, and look for the opening. It’s subtle. Too subtle. But once you find it, you’ll unlock a whole new respect for the devs who really said, “let’s hide stuff and not tell anyone.” And now you know. You're welcome.

Something shady at the hospital

The hospital isn’t just where you respawn after a “tragic fall.” It’s also home to one of Brookhaven’s creepiest (and coolest) secrets. Upstairs in the abandoned part, there’s a hidden room with cryptic messages, broken machines, and straight-up Area 51 vibes. Look for a blue paper sticking out of a vent or some weird glitchy parts of the wall—tap around. It feels like a mix of Brookhaven RP and X-Files, and honestly? That’s a genre mashup we didn’t know we needed.

The pool hideout room that’s basically a villain lair

Near the top floor of the building next to the swimming pool, there’s a secret button (again, not spilling all the sauce here) that unlocks a whole hidden hideout complete with a supervillain lair or secret agent HQ vibe. Whatever you decide to use it for, it’s the RP goldmine for players with main-character energy.

Brookhaven RP isn’t just about roleplaying - it’s about discovering. Behind every tree, under every floor, and inside every unassuming building, there’s a twist waiting to be found, perfect as fuel for your next storyline. So next time you log in, explore the place. Want the inside scoop? Read our Brookhaven secrets guide and unlock the hidden side of one of Roblox’s most iconic towns. Because the town may look quiet, but trust us, it’s anything but.

title: How to Get Free Robux Without Scams
image_title: RobloxGo - How to Get Free Robux Without Scams
image_alt: RobloxGo - How to Get Free Robux Without Scams - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Free Robux and scams. They go hand in hand but, we’re here with some ways through which you can get free Robux without getting scammed.
content_html:
How to Get Free Robux Without Scams

June 5, 2025 by abdullah
>
Free Robux and scams. They go hand in hand but, we’re here with some ways through which you can get free Robux without getting scammed.

It's a familiar and unfortunate story. A new Roblox player—often a younger user with a default avatar—comes across a YouTube video claiming to offer 10,000 free Robux through "no verification" and supposedly "legitimate" methods. They click the link, only to potentially have their Roblox account compromised. Sadly, this has become a common experience for many.

However, the important truth is this: it is possible to earn Robux for free - without resorting to suspicious links or unsafe browser extensions. The key lies in using legitimate methods, staying informed, and exercising a bit of patience.

So, make sure you read this before you try to get free Robux. Seriously. It'll save you from losing your account and your sanity.

Create and sell your own Roblox content

Let’s start with the most Roblox-approved method—game development. You don’t need to be a coding wizard with five monitors and a can of Monster Energy. Roblox Studio is user-friendly enough that even casual players can build something playable. And if you're feeling ambitious? Throw in some game passes. A few cosmetic items. Maybe a donation button. People will support you if your game has any kind of fun factor or charm. And guess what? Every sale? Robux.

You keep a chunk of the revenue. The more people play and spend in your game, the more your Robux stash grows. Is it instant? No. Is it free? Well, technically yes. Is it legit? Absolutely. Plus, you get to brag that you’re a Roblox game developer now. It'll definitely help enhance your resume.

Join the Microsoft Rewards grind

Okay, it’s not glamorous, but it works. Microsoft Rewards gives you points for doing things like using Bing (yes, people still do that), completing quizzes, or clicking through news stories. Rack up enough points and boom—you can trade them in for a Roblox gift card. It’s like coupon clipping for the digital age. It takes a bit of commitment, but it’s safe and official.

Participate in Roblox events or giveaways

From time to time, Roblox runs official events or partners with brands, like NERF, Sonic, or other surprising crossovers. These events sometimes drop off free cosmetics or offer event-exclusive Robux rewards. You just have to keep your eyes open and hop on early. Some legit YouTubers or Roblox creators host giveaways, too, but here’s the golden rule: if someone’s asking you to enter your login info? It’s a trap. If they ask you to click on a third-party site that looks shady? Also a trap. Stick with verified, consistent creators and not those who are constantly shouting “FREE ROBUX 100% LEGIT” to get views or subscribers.

Build a Roblox group and earn from it

This one’s a long game, but if you build a community, make group merch, and actually grow a little fanbase—you can earn Robux through clothing sales and donations. You’ll need Premium to create shirts and pants. But once those are up, every sale adds Robux to your group’s funds. From there, you can pay it out to yourself or others in the group. Basically, you become a small-business CEO... but with pixel t-shirts.

Final tip: Don’t trust the glittery nonsense

If it sounds too good to be true, it is. Period. No generator, no “Robux injector,” no shady Discord link is going to give you 10,000 Robux for doing nothing. All they’ll give you is heartbreak and a hacked account.

content_html:
Secret Roblox Places You Can Still Access

June 5, 2025 by abdullah
>
A world without any boundaries. A world that doesn’t know any ends. We’re here with some secret Roblox places that you can still access.

In the ever-expanding universe of Roblox, there is truly something for everyone, whether it's operating a virtual pizza factory, exploring haunted high schools, or engaging in chaotic banana-flinging antics. However, beyond the vibrant energy and lively creations lies a lesser-known side of the platform: mysterious, long-forgotten experiences that continue to exist in the shadows. For those curious enough to explore, these hidden relics offer a glimpse into the deeper, often overlooked history of the platform.



So, if you're feeling adventurous—and slightly nosy—here are a few secret Roblox places you can still sneak into. Don't forget to bring your curiosity.



Egg Hunt 2018: The Great Yolktales



The Egg Hunt 2018: The Great Yolktales may not be splashed all over the front page anymore, but the place never truly shut down. This wasn’t just another event map. It was an entire interconnected multiverse of eggs, lore, and mind-melting puzzles. The kind of place where every egg you collected felt like you’d just completed a spiritual journey. You can still explore parts of it if you find the right entry points through preserved links or archived event hubs. Some areas even load up fully, though they sit eerily quiet now, like a museum of Roblox greatness past.



The Vault by berezaa



This one? Straight-up mysterious. Created by the legendary Miner’s Haven developer, bereza, The Vault is a locked-down area within the Miner's Haven experience. It serves as a testing ground for updates to Miner's Haven and is also a place where players can sometimes get infinite money during update testing. It's also a place where berezaa frequently visits.



Roblox Crossroads (Classic)



For old-school veterans or curious explorers, the original Crossroads map still lives. Built by Roblox legend John Shedletsky, this was one of the first real PvP experiences to ever go viral on the platform. It’s low-poly, kind of janky, but full of Roblox history. It’s like time-traveling to 2006. You can still load it up and experience a weird kind of digital nostalgia even if you never played it back then.



Interns’ Testing Grounds



There are a few of these scattered around—strangely named Map Test by Roblox interns or developers. Some have nothing but floating baseplates. Others are filled with strange testing scripts, broken toolkits, or mysterious structures left half-finished. They’re not meant to be public, but many still are. And finding one? It’s like stumbling into someone’s forgotten sketchpad. Random, raw, and weirdly fascinating.



Doomspire Brickbattle



Yes, you’ve played the remakes; the modern glow-up versions with fancier bricks and rules, but the original Doomspire Brickbattle’s template—the one with the most unbalanced towers and legendary glitches? It's still up and playable. If you're looking for a game from the past, this might just be it.



The Haunted Mansion Test Map



When you’re out to discover hidden Roblox places, it doesn’t get much discreet than Haunted Mansion. Not official. Not well-known. But accessible. A long-forgotten demo for a Halloween showcase from years ago. Some players rediscovered it buried under a dev’s inactive projects. It loads into a foggy mansion with flickering lights, unfinished NPCs, and one room that loops when you exit. It’s creepy in a way only something abandoned mid-project can be. And yes, you can still join—if you dig deep enough.

title: How to Create a Roblox Game in 5 Steps
image_title: RobloxGo - How to Create a Roblox Game in 5 Steps
image_alt: RobloxGo - How to Create a Roblox Game in 5 Steps - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Modern gaming platforms like Roblox aren't just for playing - they also let users create and share their own games, making them a hub for creativity and community.
content_html:
How to Create a Roblox Game in 5 Steps

June 5, 2025 by jose
>
Modern gaming platforms like Roblox aren't just for playing - they also let users create and share their own games, making them a hub for creativity and community.

Modern-day gaming platforms are not only popular for gamers to play in, but also for introducing and sharing one's creative and artistic talents with others. Roblox is a very good example of such an online platform and gaming community where everyone is welcome to make their own game and share it.



The beauty of making games in Roblox is that practically everything you need to build it, test it, and finally share it with the rest of the community is all within a mouse click. The platform uses an experience development system that has been continually evolving over the years that today, Roblox Studio (as it is called) is way more easier to use and a lot more expansive with its new features.



To begin with, Roblox as a gaming or experience platform was created as an online educational tool for kids to use from the get-go, although through some twist of amusing fate, the platform gained popularity over the entire spectrum of gamers and computer users alike regardless of age.



Creating your own game and sharing or showing it off (whatever the reason may be) has never been easier since the first video game creators in the 1970s had to write everything in machine or Assembler language. Today, with Roblox Studio, all one has to do is commit oneself to learning the ins and outs of it and go through a kind of trial and learning effort to come out with a fully functional and enjoyable gaming experience.



So, for both the young and the young at heart, let's look at the five major steps involved in creating or developing your own game in Roblox Studio from beginning to end (and maybe beyond).



1. Set Up the Roblox Studio


Before one considers the idea of making a game, make sure first that one is (to a point), computer savvy because one is going to need it.



When starting with Roblox game development, you'll need the application where you will make the game, and in order to download it, you of course need a Roblox account. Register or sign up on Roblox, and when you do, Roblox will install the player app on your PC.



Log in to the Roblox Site, go to the create section, and click on "Start Creating," which will automatically download Roblox Studio if it isn't already installed on your computer. Just follow our steps to create your first Roblox game, it's not that hard (even a 5-year-old can do it) and you'll have the Roblox Studio ready for use. You'll see both the Player and Roblox Studio icons on your desktop screen.



Click on the (blue) Roblox Studio icon to launch the game creator app with a really user-friendly interface that will give you options like "New", "Create New", and "My Games".



2. Choosing a Game Template


In Roblox Studio, you will need a game environment to begin making your game. These are called "Templates", and you can select from several readily available ones from the start.



Click on the "Create New" button and browse through the available templates for an environment that you want to begin with. The basic template is called "Baseplate" as it is the simplest, providing a default "Spawn Area" (where your avatar shows up and says hello), and a grid environment providing a blank slate on which you can build.



Others like Village, Pirate Island, Castle, and Obby among others are available as well, but these templates are already initially populated from the start. Templates let you focus more on customization and scripting to save effort and time starting from zero.



3. World Customization


Now that you have your basic environment, you will have to modify it to conform to the kind of game you want the other players in the community to explore and play. Roblox Studio has the tools and functions for this.



You'll have to familiarize yourself with the overall interface of the app (poke around so you will know where to find that which you need to use) and at this point, you will need to use the "Explorer" and "Properties" panels to add, adjust, or remove objects in your game environment.



A tip, though - YouTube has a gazillion Roblox Studio tutorials that can go beyond the boundaries of this simple and space-limited article because they can show you where and what to click and so on. Use this guide along with the YT tutorials to get yourself used to using the studio app.



Your main customization targets are these: Access the "Toolbox" to find the models, textures, and sounds created by other developers for community use. If you can create your own, you can upload them as well.



You can then adjust the settings to smooth out the game elements like the spawn points, lighting, terrain, and others to get the environment that you want.



4. Programming the Gameplay


Once you have the environment, you will have to turn it into a game by programming the platform's game engine to do this or that in your created experience. If you want the people visiting your creation to actually play, and not just go sightseeing and walk around, you will have to add game coding, or scripting, to your creation.



Roblox uses a language derived from LUA, so learning how to code in LUA is a requirement if you want to write your own scripts and do the game programming yourself.



First, open the "Script Editor". Right-click on an object in the "Explorer Panel" and select "Insert Object" > "Script".



This is where you write your code or paste an existing, ready-made script. Once you have learned how to program in Roblox LUA, it's best to begin with simple codes like turning a block invisible when touched and other simple actions.



Test and debug your code by clicking the "Play" button and interacting with your programmed object to check if it behaves the way it's supposed to. Coding makes your experience come alive with complex interactions and game mechanics.



Again, it cannot be stressed enough that you should know where to look for the information you need particularly if you want or need to learn how to program your own Roblox game. Start with the Roblox Creator Hub and Developer Forums, as you will find a lot of tutorials and ready-made scripts you will need for your development efforts.



Other sources include YouTube, where a gazillion Roblox topics and tutorials have accumulated over the years. There are a lot of simple tutorials that lay things out in a simple manner, while keeping in view the more complex ones for when you grow in knowledge.



Try to also visit Tynker.com as they offer beginner Roblox programming guides and step-by-step tutorials.



5. Test and Publish


Before a game is released to the public, it has to be quality checked, and even in Roblox (no matter how young you are), you have to make sure that your game works as advertised. Use the "Play" button to enter "PlayMode" and check your game. If you have trusted friends, let them play around with it as well.



De-bug your programming by using the "output" panel to check for errors. After you are really satisfied that your game works, click on "File" > "Publish to Roblox As" and fill in the game details, like description, name, genre, etc.



Learning how to develop (professionally-made)games in Roblox is a time-consuming and complex process. The end results, however, will depend on the commitment of the developer (no matter how young or old) to see the project through and come up with an experience that others will flock to, enjoy, and remember (and know) you for it.

title: Roblox Not Letting Me In: Fix Login Issues (Solved)
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Not Letting Me In: Fix Login Issues (Solved)
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox Not Letting Me In: Fix Login Issues (Solved) - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Trouble logging in into Roblox? Yeah, no big a deal. We’re here to help with this guide in case you’re facing login problems on Roblox.
content_html:
Roblox Not Letting Me In: Fix Login Issues (Solved)

June 4, 2025 by Skyrus
>
Trouble logging in into Roblox? Yeah, no big a deal. We’re here to help with this guide in case you’re facing login problems on Roblox.

There you are - snacks in hand, time to spare, and your friends already in-game, enthusiastically chatting and making progress on a tycoon you all planned to start together. But instead of joining them, you're stuck staring at a frozen Roblox login screen. Worse still, the system keeps rejecting your password as if it no longer recognizes you. A frustratingly familiar situation for many players.



Let’s be real—Roblox is huge. We’re talking planetary-scale player numbers, thousands of games, daily chaos. And with great size comes... great technical hiccups. Sometimes, the login just breaks. It’s annoying. It’s random. But don’t worry—we’re gonna break it down and get you back in-game as soon as possible. Here’s how to fix login problems in Roblox!



Double-check yourself and the server status



First things first—breathe. Before you go on a dramatic rant about Roblox breaking your soul, check the basics. Like… are you actually typing the right username and password? Caps lock is a sneaky little traitor, so make sure to check that. Also, ensure you’re not autocorrecting yourself into oblivion if you’re logging in from mobile. Happens more often than we admit.



Still no luck? Time to check the Roblox server status. The platform has had its fair share of meltdowns. When the servers are down, literally nothing works—logins included. Just hit up status.roblox.com and confirm whether the Roblox servers are up or if it's just your internet getting a hiccup.



Clear your cache



Browser version? App? Doesn’t matter. If Roblox isn’t letting you in, your cache might be plotting against you. It holds on to broken login attempts like your browser has beef with you. Clear that cache. Wipe the cookies. Restart the app. It’s like a digital reset button and honestly, kind of therapeutic. On PC, try switching browsers entirely. Chrome throwing tantrums? Firefox might be your savior. On mobile, delete and reinstall the app. It’s a classic move and it works way more than you'd expect. Think of it as telling the app, “Get your act together, or you’re out.”



Switch from using Wi-Fi to a mobile hotspot



Now, here’s a weirdly effective trick—switch to a mobile hotspot. A bunch of users have said that switching from Wi-Fi to their phone’s hotspot lets them log in instantly. Why? Maybe your Wi-Fi firewalls are being unnecessarily dramatic. But if you’re stuck at the login screen and your internet is just blinking at you like “I did my best,” turn that phone into a portable router and see what happens. It might just be your golden ticket.



Two-step verification: helpful or betrayal?



Look, security is great. Until it starts locking you out. If you’ve got two-step verification on, make sure your verification method (email or phone) is still working. If you changed your number or deleted the email linked to your account, Roblox won’t know who you are anymore. In that case, hit the password recovery. Be patient. Follow the steps. It might take a bit, but it’ll remind Roblox that yes, you actually own that account you're trying to login.



If all else fails, contact Roblox support



Still locked out? Time to bring in the big guns—support. Open a ticket on the Roblox Help page and explain what’s going on. Make sure to include details, and as frustrated as you are, make sure you are polite. Their response time varies, but they do respond. You just need to be patient.



Roblox login issues are weirdly common for a platform this massive, but 99% of the time, it’s something you can fix. So clear that cache. Switch to that hotspot. Reboot, retry, and reclaim your place in the metaverse.

short_description: Blox Fruits is a world of endless possibilities but, getting your hand on the Dark Blade isn’t an easy task so, let’s guide you on how you can get the Dark Blade in Blox Fruits.
content_html:
How to Get Dark Blade in Blox Fruits (2025 Guide)

June 4, 2025 by abdullah
>
Blox Fruits is a world of endless possibilities but, getting your hand on the Dark Blade isn’t an easy task so, let’s guide you on how you can get the Dark Blade in Blox Fruits.

The world of Roblox. It’s got everything. Well, everything that not everyone can get their hands on. Dark Blade is one of those items in Blox Fruits. You’ve seen it. You’ve feared it. Maybe you’ve been sliced by it. But now? It’s your turn to chase it. Because in the world of Blox Fruits, where everyone’s busy grinding fruits and flexing their flashy auras, owning a Dark Blade isn’t just power—it’s a statement.



If you’ve been itching to unlock the Dark Blade in Blox Fruits, this 2025 guide’s your ultimate cheat sheet.



Pay up or grind down—your two paths to power



So here’s the raw, unfiltered truth: the fastest way to get your very own Dark Blade? Buy it. Yep. Robux. Cold, hard Robux. You need 1,200 of them to be exact. One tap in the in-game store and bam—you’re suddenly swinging around a legendary weapon like you’ve always known what you’re doing. No judgment. If you’ve got the Robux and no time for side quests, go for it. It’s like skipping the ramen and jumping straight to dessert.



But maybe you’re not about that pay-to-win life. Maybe you enjoy a challenge. A chase. A little digital suffering in the name of glory. In that case, buckle up because there is another way. A longer and grindier path, but oh boy, it hits different when you finally pull it off.



The mysterious power of gifting and friends who flex



Now here’s where it gets spicy. You can get the Dark Blade as a gift—from another player. Yep. If you’ve got a super generous buddy or someone who owes you for not exposing their secret stash of fruit trades, they can straight-up gift it to you. It's rare, but it happens, mostly in legends and late-night servers. So hey, be nice. You never know who might throw a legendary sword your way when you least expect it.



Also, some rumors have swirled around certain NPCs offering the Dark Blade through specific interactions or events. But let’s be real—that route’s buried in mystery, RNG luck, and the occasional misleading YouTube thumbnail. Fun to try, but not great for guaranteed results.



It’s not just a sword—it’s a flex that slices



Let’s talk real quick about why this blade causes such a stir. It’s not just the cool name (though, come on, “Dark Blade” does sound like something a fantasy villain would monologue about). It’s the performance. The range. The speed. The insane AoE. It levels like a dream, and when you awaken it into Dark Blade V2 or even V3, you’re no longer just fighting—you’re performing. Stylishly. And the best part? It doesn’t rely on fruits. You don’t have to trade away your soul for a better Devil Fruit combo. This sword stands on its own—deadly, clean, and ridiculously satisfying.



The journey matters—even if the sword looks cooler



Sure, owning the Dark Blade is a huge brag. It’s a sword people recognize from miles away. But what makes it worth it isn’t just how good it is—it’s the fact that it’s rare. That it’s earned (or bought... whatever, no shame). It sets you apart. It marks a turning point in your Blox Fruits journey, like going from noob to legend with a single swing. So go on. Chase it. Save your Robux, make some in-game allies, or just become the kind of player who owns it.

title: Best Ways to Win Tower Defense Simulator in Roblox
image_title: RobloxGo - Best Ways to Win Tower Defense Simulator in Roblox
image_alt: RobloxGo - Best Ways to Win Tower Defense Simulator in Roblox - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Struggling to win while trying your best on Roblox’s Tower defense games? Don’t worry, we’re here to help you with some helpful ways.
content_html:
Best Ways to Win Tower Defense Simulator in Roblox

June 4, 2025 by abdullah
>
Struggling to win while trying your best on Roblox’s Tower defense games? Don’t worry, we’re here to help you with some helpful ways.

Roblox is like walking into a digital candy store run by a bunch of overly creative 14-year-olds—and we love it. You've got tycoons, obbies, roleplay dramas that go from zero to telenovela in seconds... and then, boom, you stumble into Tower Defense Simulator and suddenly you're knee-deep in strategy, sweat, and asking yourself why these blocky zombies are smarter than you. This ain’t just some casual tower-plopping snooze-fest. It’s intense. And if you’re tired of getting clapped before wave 20, don’t stress. We got you - Check out our Tower Defense tips for Roblox pros.



Start simple, but don’t be basic



Listen, everyone starts with Scouts and dreams of Commanders. But don’t get stuck in the "cheap towers = easy win" mindset. Cheap doesn’t mean good forever. Yes, early waves can be handled by your trusty Scout, but by wave 15, you're gonna need firepower that doesn't blink. Get into the habit of upgrading wisely. Don’t spam weak towers like you're decorating a Christmas tree. Fewer, stronger units always beat a chaotic lawn of weaklings. Be choosy. Be intentional. Think like a boss—even if your character’s still wearing bacon hair.



Farms are not optional. They are religion



Let’s talk cash. And I don’t mean Robux—I mean cold, hard in-game tower money. If you’re not farming by wave 5, you’re basically speedrunning failure. Farms are the backbone of any long-term win. The earlier you invest, the sooner you’re dropping Rangers and Minigunners like a boss on a power trip. Don't let the idea of "wasting a slot on farms" fool you. It’s not a waste. It’s part of the strategy. No farms means no funds, and no funds means no win.



Know your roles or prepare for chaos



Tower Defense Simulator is not a solo act in a crowded server. If you’ve got four players all spamming the same unit, you’re just building a sad army of redundancy. Talk to your team (or at least type “pls farm” and hope for miracles). Coordinate. If someone brings Medic, maybe don’t also bring Medic. If one of you has DJ Booth, let the others bring different support. Diversity in towers equals to flexibility. Be the player who brings what’s needed, not just what’s shiny.



Placement matters. Like, a lot



Oh, you thought tower placement was just... anywhere? Cute. Tower positioning is 90% of the win. Put your long-range dudes where they have the biggest sightline. Toss short-range units at choke points. And for the love of tactical thinking—don’t crowd everything into the first corner and pray. Spread it out. Layer your defense. Build zones. It’s not just a game. It’s a dance. And your towers are the backup dancers trying to keep the zombies off the stage.



Adapt or get overwhelmed



Every round is different. That’s the kicker. Just when you think you’ve nailed your setup, a hidden boss appears and wipes your smug little grin right off. Upgrade accordingly. If you see fast units breaking through? More snipers or slowing units. Hidden enemies? You better have detection upgrades, or it’s game over while you stare blankly at the “Defeat” screen wondering where it all went wrong.

title: 10 Popular Roblox Slangs: Do You Know Them All?
image_title: RobloxGo - 10 Popular Roblox Slangs: Do You Know Them All?
image_alt: RobloxGo - 10 Popular Roblox Slangs: Do You Know Them All? - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Featuring the top 10 popular Roblox slang used by players in their games and the community. See which ones you know and check out the meaning of those you don’t!
content_html:
10 Popular Roblox Slangs: Do You Know Them All?

January 22, 2025 by JonPH
>
Featuring the top 10 popular Roblox slang used by players in their games and the community. See which ones you know and check out the meaning of those you don’t!

Slangs are terms used by people to mean a particular set of ideas that usually revolve around a community like in Roblox Go. For gamers, these are used to easily convey a message with less fuss or effort to type or say the entirety of the word or phrase. So time to test your knowledge on the 10 popular Roblox slang and see if you know them all.

1. Beaned/Termed/PGed


This term is associated with your account as it mostly means having it banned, terminated, or hacked by getting its password guessed. Either way, it's bad news for you.

2. Comped/Beamed


Being comped is if you got the details of your accounts compromised while beamed refers to someone who got their limited items stolen. These terms usually go together as another player could have logged into your account and taken your things for themselves.

3. Oof/Le Oof/Uuhhh


Saying this kind of slang to another player tells them that you don’t find them interesting or entertaining anymore. This can be just a straight-up message or taunting them as well.

4. Barcode name


It’s a method used by players who want to keep themselves off the radar among those using unique nicknames. It’s a combination of the lowercase L and capital letter I and you can mix them in any way you like to create a barcode effect.

5. Voided/ FRP


Users who are termed to be voided are those who usually just play around and do not participate in the roleplay that the game presents. FRP or Fail Roleplay is another term coined for those who break the immersion to the game for others.

6. Alt/Sock/Sockpuppet/Burner OR Smurf


An alt or alternate is another account owned by a higher-tiered player to join lower-ranked games. They get to play against those with beginner-level skills who are just still learning the mechanics and gameplay of Roblox.

7. Boosted Ape


Being a Boosted Ape is getting to a powerful position not because you have earned it through your skills but being carried or helped by an ally to get there. Usually, they are players who lack the ability to reach that tier.

8. Tags or Tagging


If you use words not accepted by Roblox then it will automatically be converted to hashtags as the chat filter just changes it on its own. Examples of these are bad or curse words inappropriate for younger users.

9. Skid/Script kiddie


The term Skid is used to describe players who use and abuse scripts and injectors when playing the game to gain an upper hand against others. Using methods like this can lead to negative effects on your account when found out by Roblox.

10. NGF, RAP, and OP


These are used in trading as NGF or Not Going First, RAP or Recent Average Price, and OP or Overpay. They usually refer to slang for haggling and making sure you are not scammed.

To wrap it up, these are 10 Roblox slang popular within the community and are used widely by the fanbase. If there are some that you did not know yet and was the first time you encountered it here then you have learned some to add to your gaming vocabulary. So the next chance you go online, check which ones are used more often than the others or if there are also those not included in the list.

title: Roblox Modding: What You Can and Cannot Do
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Modding: What You Can and Cannot Do
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox Modding: What You Can and Cannot Do - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Over the years, the process of modifying the most popular games has become a constant preoccupation among gaming communities worldwide. The Roblox platform is no exception, however, there are just some things that one can, and can't do when it comes to modding in Roblox.
content_html:
Roblox Modding: What You Can and Cannot Do

March 20, 2025 by jose
>
Over the years, the process of modifying the most popular games has become a constant preoccupation among gaming communities worldwide. The Roblox platform is no exception, however, there are just some things that one can, and can't do when it comes to modding in Roblox.

Let's begin first with what Roblox modding is and why so many community members are doing it. When someone mods (or modifies) a game, the game files, looks, textures, sounds, and even how the game is played are altered in some way to make it look like a new or slightly different game.

This is done on Roblox in order to customize and make the game into something the modder wants it to be. Aside from coming up with a new game from an original game, modders love to show of their personal creativity and fun at the same time.

Roblox game modding provides several advantages and options to players should they want the option to play a slightly different game or an entirely new one without leaving the Roblox platform. Here are some of the things that modding can accomplish on Roblox.

What modding can do


1. Visuals and sound
Modding can visually change the appearance of the game, which includes both the graphics and sounds. The graphics can be enhanced and given a new look and feel to it, while custom sounds can be used to replace the original sounds.

These can include a new look for the characters that can give the impression of entirely new characters added to or replacing the originals in the game. Sounds, music, and voiceovers can be custom-made as well like saying things in another language or changing the music.

2. Textures
Altering the game textures can alter the characters, objects, and environment in the game. For example, changing the texture of a wall by changing its color from grey to wood brown will make it look like a wall made of wood rather than stone or cement. That is modding.

3. Gameplay
Adding new items and abilities will somehow change how the game is played and how players will react to the changes. If a game is set during the medieval era and a modder replaces the Siege Engine with a Tank, well, you get the picture.

When creating new Roblox maps, many map designers or modders use LUA programming to set or change the characteristics of the map or modify the game. Programming or scripting is one way to modify an existing game.

Some modders create what are known as "Mod Menus". These user interfaces are used to access different gameplay modifications available on a mod or the base game itself. It's like a user-friendly mod launcher leaving the player the option to load and play any available modification of choice.

4. Some other mod applications.
Other modification options include features like an FPS (Frame-rate per sec) unlocker which lets the player unlock and use higher frame-rates for the game. Usually, this improves game performance but at times can cause conflict with the device's hardware or the game itself.

Also, some modifications are used to access some old features of the game like old avatar editors, or to test new features to be implemented on Roblox Studio before they are publicly released.

These are some of the obvious reasons and benefits that Roblox modding can provide. However, there are certain important considerations users interested in modding or using mods should be very much aware of.

These include the platform's terms of service, where certain usage rules of the company are stated and have to be explicitly followed. There are community guidelines which are rules that govern the Roblox community as a whole put in place as respect to the experiences of the others.

Finally, there is the need for safety as the platform and the Internet at large may always be subject to the dangers of unscrupulous users and people with bad intentions. This includes downloading suspect third-party content that may prove very harmful in the long run.

Again, looking at the other side of the coin this time, let's take a look at some of the limitations or the prohibited stuff when modding or using mods on Roblox.

Roblox modding limitations


1. Only get your mods from safe and reputable sites.
It is always wise to check first if the website you are downloading a mod from is legitimate and has a good reputation. These sites make sure that the mods they have are thoroughly checked, well-made, and compatible with the base game.

Using a trusted source to download from greatly ensures that things like malware, viruses, and corrupt files can be avoided, as they can end up harming not only your device but the hosting game server as well and may get you into unwanted trouble. For safe Roblox mods, a website like NexusMods is a good place to start with.

2. Going beyond texture modding is not always advisable.
For those who intend to mod Roblox beyond just changing the looks and feel of the game, be sure first that you have sufficient knowledge regarding the programming of the game. Things like modifying or replacing codes in the game, adding custom assets, or changing the gameplay can lead to operational errors and crashes.

Many modders who try to change the core mechanics of the game find out that Roblox starts to behave erratic and unstable when deep changes are made. Modders should be careful and sure of what they are doing otherwise sticking to looks and feel would be a better and safer bet.

3. Modding to cheat.
Some modders make mods to be able to cheat. This is quite prevalent in the FPS gaming world. In Roblox, creating mods that let you exploit the game in any way (like letting you fly or make you invisible) is strictly prohibited and against the Roblox terms of service.

This can get a user/modder banned, suspended, or permanently kicked out from the platform, so be careful in creating or using a mod that has game exploitive features in any way.

4. Public and private server mod usage.
Running Roblox on a private server is quite different from running it on a public one. A private server is used by a person or a few individuals like a team or group. It is private and what goes on within it is limited to the few people playing on it.

Running a Roblox mod that can do a lot of crazy stuff that can be considered illegal on a regular Roblox server is a prevalent occurrence because it is private. Only the server owner and his friends probably know about it, and it does not affect the whole Roblox community and industry (at large) in any way.

Some server owners will naturally showcase their unique and awesome mods on streaming services like YouTube, Rumble, or even Twitch. But again, though it can publicly be seen, it cannot (publicly) be played.

Should you bring that mod to a public Roblox server and it violates the platform's terms of use, the Roblox Terms of Service, Roblox platform security, and all the other things that can go wrong, well, you'll find yourself in a lot of trouble not only with your user account but other possible legal reasons as well. A public server is used by the community at large and is a part of the commercial entity of Roblox where the company rules apply.

And there you have it folks, the basic do's and dont's when it comes to Roblox modding. However, don't let the limitations scare or deter you if you really want to mod. Just stick to both the platform's and safety rules, and you can take pride in your awesome and unique Roblox creations.

Most Played Roblox Games - Find Out Which Ones Top the Charts

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
Answering your burning questions about Roblox - one question at a time!

RobloxGo Answers is a brand new series that we've decided to launch on RobloxGo to answer all of your burning questions about Roblox!! In the 2nd edition of RobloxGo Answers, we'll answer one of the most-asked questions in Roblox!

RobloxGo Answers: What are the Most Played Roblox Games?

Blox Fruits

With a whopping 400,000 active players,Blox Fruits is undoubtedly one of the top games on Roblox. In a nutshell, the primary reason for its appeal is that it takes inspiration from the popular One Piece anime, thanks to its use of Devil Fruits and pirate-related themes. Players will embark on a pirate-themed journey comparable to the popular anime, exploring various islands via ship. From there, they can take on enemies and gain new abilities by obtaining new fruits, which can turn the tide of battle. Some of these fruits include Rocket, Spin, Chop, Spring, Bomb, Smoke, Spike, and Flame, with each granting abilities in line with their names.

Brookhaven

Have you ever wanted to live life in a digital simulation? Well, you can in Brookhaven, an RPG experience on Roblox where you can create and customize virtual characters and immerse yourself in a fun and thriving digital community. Moreover, players can also create their own fully furnished homes, interact with millions of other players, and engage in various scenarios. The game also holds numerous events players can join, giving the virtual residents a place to connect and share unique virtual experiences. Currently, the game has over 200,000 active players.

Blade Ball

If you would like something a little more action-packed, then Blade Ball is a game of action, timing, and strategy. It has over 90,000 players, even if the gameplay is relatively straightforward. Basically, players hit a homing ball moving back and forth while it gets increasingly faster. To further spice up the gameplay, players can obtain new abilities and purchase new skins and cosmetics to set themselves apart from their peers. Blade Ball is a highly competitive game; you can compete and shoot for the top of the leaderboard.

Adopt Me!

Created by the team behind DreamCraft, Adopt Me! is a game where players can explore a vast, sprawling world, adopt virtual pets, build and decorate their homes, and engage in various activities and participate in a diverse range of events. One of the game’s highlights is its focus on social interaction and multiplayer, encouraging players to trade items and pets with each other. It’s a fairly active game with frequent updates, and if you’re looking for a fun, family-friendly experience, it’s your best bet. If there’s one thing fantastic about Roblox, it is its ability to offer a vast array of experiences to its players. Who knows, the list of most played Roblox games could include some new entries in the future, so be sure to keep a close watch!

title: Roblox Generative AI Chat Translator - Everything You Need to Know
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Generative AI Chat Translator - Everything You Need to Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox Generative AI Chat Translator - Everything You Need to Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: AI is making its first steps into interactive gaming. With Roblox's real-time language translation, communication issues that typically plague multiplayer settings can be sorted out easier than before.
content_html:
Roblox Generative AI Chat Translator - Everything You Need to Know

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
AI is making its first steps into interactive gaming. With Roblox's real-time language translation, communication issues that typically plague multiplayer settings can be sorted out easier than before.

What does this mean to Robloxians and, in the long run, to other gamers? AI is making a loud buzz in a lot of fields. There is little doubt that it is proving itself to be an effective tool in a growing number of applications. Looking for a quick review of a topic? AI. Looking to draw better characters or help with detailed schematics? AI. Running into a slump on a research subject? AI. It won’t take long before artificial intelligence becomes a common term in everyday living. It’s not a surprise that Roblox, a community with over 70 million active users daily, would turn to AI to provide the best communicative experience. This is regarded as a great leap in the world of gaming. So, what does this mean for every Robloxian? What’s the big deal with chat translations anyway?

So, what does it do?

The chat translator works in real-time. A user types in any of the 16 supported languages and it is automatically translated to the recipient/reader’s native tongue. For example, an English speaking player inputs chat in the native language. Any player outside of English-speaking regions will read the input in their languages, reducing the need to use software outside Roblox to understand it. This is initially expected to be used on phrases commonly used on the app. The AI is based on an open-source large language model. Expect that AI will pick linguistic cues based on similarities in language semantics.

What does this mean for players?

You can better coordinate with other players, especially if you belong to the same party. This opens better tactics, more streamlined team play, and a wholesome multiplayer experience. In case you play Roblox to hang out with friends, you can do role plays without having to worry about what language to use. Type away, and let the chat translator do its job. Since this is relatively new tech, it will start a little rough. Consistent updates to the AI should deal with wrong translations given enough time.

What is Roblox planning in the future?

This is the start of a truly inclusive gaming experience. Other plans are in the works, such as AI language voice translation. More and more features of the Roblox interface will use this language model. What is laid down the road beyond are features that quickly adapt to the needs of different cultures. In other words, Roblox is a readily available app that changes according to local tastes.

How does this affect the future of gaming?

This application of AI in gaming opens the door to more accessible interfaces. No longer do players have to worry about supported languages with adaptable AI technology. Games are easily understood by all, regardless of where they live or what they speak. The possibility of adding local preferences is no longer restricted to simply skins and color schemes. Adaptive software can make needed adjustments to suit different regulations imposed by host countries. There is also less room for misunderstanding or language barriers which are a big minus factor to many multiplayer titles. Generative AI may be a technological first in the world of gaming. How Roblox is going to implement this successfully serves as a foundation for other game engines to follow, so stay tuned here on Robloxgo.

short_description: Taking care of pets can be an adventure, especially having them as your trusty companions. Even Roblox, a platform known to give players tons of it, can let you have cute pets that can be as rewarding as their finest.
content_html:
3 Reasons Why PETS GO Should Be Your Go-to Experience on Roblox

November 7, 2024 by Marwin
>
Taking care of pets can be an adventure, especially having them as your trusty companions. Even Roblox, a platform known to give players tons of it, can let you have cute pets that can be as rewarding as their finest.

PETS GO was created by BIG Game Pets, who thought of creating another pet game based on their Pet Simulator games, thus sharing the similar cubic appearance of the pets. Aside from that, you get to collect hundreds or thousands of them if you are willing to go along the gritty ride in your pet-collecting journey.

However, this game brings something that may hook some players, whether they are familiar with the nature of “farming” or simply want to have a nice collectible of virtual pets. Sure, you can go, “Aww” each time you obtain a pet, but with methods of boosting yourself, that “Aww” reaction will be in an awesome way. These are the reasons why this Roblox game may be a worthy addition to your experience.

1. The Pets


If you have played BIG Game Pets’ Pet Simulator games, then you can already tell what will be your cubic companion. However, if you are a first-timer, there is no need to shy about trying this type of genre. In here, all you have to do is tap the dice and let the rolling continue until you randomly obtain pets such as domestics, wild, exotic, mythic, and even bizarre ones. Despite being only in cubic form, their cuteness is still irresistible, and they look friendly (although sometimes wacky) and will follow you around the area.

You cannot even imagine what kind of pets you will have. It will take your imagination and expectations away to a certain degree, as the anticipation is something this game wants you to grasp.

2. Simple Mechanics


Like mentioned before, just wait for the dice to be rolled before tapping it to get a random pet. There are no complications, just you, your pets, the dice that keep rolling, and the anticipation of the hatching. Finger cross, you get a unique pet.

The progression of this pet game is quite simple as well. When hatching for pets, there are a number of requirements for you to do so in order to receive handy rewards, such as unlocking upgrades that can be useful for you. And just like that, you may find yourself surprised by how much you have gained just by doing less complex tasks.

3. Upgrading for pets and you


Not only do you get random pets by chance, but you get to upgrade your needs, too. Like upgrading to get free coins to earn so you can buy more necessities such as faster hatching speed, inventory, auto rolling the dice, getting luckier hatches, leveling, trading, boosts, purchasing hovercrafts for faster travel across the area, valuable pets, and get potions that will certainly can grant you better pulls to get a much rarer pet. However, be warned, the more you upgrade, the more expensive it gets, so make sure to aim for the right ones with your pets!

Having pets, no matter what they are, can be such a goal, let alone obtain one or many in a virtual game. Fortunately, PETS GO gives ease when it comes to rolling the dice to hatch the eggs. Fingers crossed that you may get a rare pet- or better yet, a much rarer pet from the last one you got- or even that same rarer pet because why not?

No harm done but a good old simplistic and semi-idle grinding to collect more common, mythic, or bizarre companions at your side. If you still cannot get enough of having pets in the game, there are other Roblox pet games you can check out in this list at RobloxGo! Consider it as a worthy look if you are a pet lover.

title: Brookhaven - How to Do a Perfect Wheelie
image_title: RobloxGo - Brookhaven - How to Do a Perfect Wheelie
image_alt: RobloxGo - Brookhaven - How to Do a Perfect Wheelie - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: You can do a lot of things in Brookhaven RP, and one of those is to ride a bike and perform a wheelie. In this blog post, we’ll take a look at how players like you can perform a wheelie in Brookhaven.
content_html:
Brookhaven - How to Do a Perfect Wheelie

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
You can do a lot of things in Brookhaven RP, and one of those is to ride a bike and perform a wheelie. In this blog post, we’ll take a look at how players like you can perform a wheelie in Brookhaven.

Brookhaven RP is one of the top Roblox games out there, and there’s a lot players can do in its massive, sprawling, and populated world. For example, you can buy a home, get a job, and just hang out with friends, replicating what you can do in real life. To get around in Brookhaven, you can walk around, but moving around would be a lot faster if you had a vehicle. Thankfully, players have access to various rides, including cars and motorcycles. Regarding the latter, you can perform tricks, and in this piece, we’ll be diving deep into how players can perform a wheelie in Brookhaven. Our staff here at Robloxgo created a video for your reference: Get a motorcycle and find a long, flat surface If you want to perform a successful wheelie in Brookhaven, you need to come equipped with a motorcycle, preferably a Spirit Motorcycle. With that said, utilizing a bicycle or a scooter may not be enough to get the job done. Once you’ve opened your inventory and selected your ride, the next step is to, of course, ride it. After which, find a flat, long surface like a road or an unoccupied part of town. Speedometer settings After that, the next step is to click on the speedometer settings and click on the icon where the front wheel is elevated - trust us, you won’t miss it. Next, make sure that the drift setting is set to “1” while the max speed is at “55.” Once you have entered the right numbers and done all the steps mentioned above, move your bike, and voila, you’re now doing a wheelie in Brookhaven! You can now drive around town, showing off your motorcycle (and the neat trick associated with it) to your friends! For a more detailed guide, here’s a video prepared by our staff here at RobloxGo: Wheelie good time Now that you know how to do a wheelie in Brookhaven, it’s time for you - and your friends - to have a good time. We at RobloxGo suggest performing a few wheelie-themed activities with Roblox friends! For example, you can hold “wheelie” fun races around Brookhaven to see who has the fastest motorcycle wheels in town. Can you do wheelies on other vehicles? Not yet. It seems like you can only ride wheelies on motorcycles in Brookhaven. However, we do hope that, in the future, we can perform wheelies on other vehicles. Doing it on a bicycle seems fair, considering this is a norm in real life. However, doing it in cars and other four-wheeled vehicles would add more spice to this trick. After all, it would be a little shocking to see a car perform a wheelie, right? Although the game borders on realism, it would be nice to see a bit of wackiness in it. So, get out there, do a wheelie in Brookhaven, and have a “wheelie” good time!

title: Beware of Malware The Hidden Dangers in Roblox Mods
image_title: RobloxGo - Beware of Malware The Hidden Dangers in Roblox Mods
image_alt: RobloxGo - Beware of Malware The Hidden Dangers in Roblox Mods - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Roblox developers and users, it’s time to take a more proactive approach and save yourself from the dangers and threats that malware possess in Roblox mods.
content_html:
Beware of Malware The Hidden Dangers in Roblox Mods

January 27, 2025 by abdullah
>
Roblox developers and users, it’s time to take a more proactive approach and save yourself from the dangers and threats that malware possess in Roblox mods.

A digital playground where creativity knows no bounds? Yip, that’s Roblox. As developers create games and users enjoy their creativity, there’s a threat that lurks around. There are mods, you’re probably familiar with Mode on Roblox. There’s malware hidden within these very mods. No one wants their safety to be breached. No one wants that simple, fun gaming session turning into a threat so, let’s discuss how these malwares make their way to your systems and how to prevent yourself from them.

The hidden threat in harmless mods



At first glance, downloading a mod seems harmless. You find a cool-looking extension promising custom skins, new gameplay mechanics, or fancy in-game perks. You install it, expecting a better gaming experience, but what you don’t see is the malicious code hidden behind the scenes. Some of these files aren’t just simple add-ons; they’re Trojan horses, designed to steal passwords, track keystrokes, or even take over entire devices. One moment you’re upgrading your game, the next, your personal data is sitting in a hacker’s database.

Researchers have uncovered Roblox mods loaded with malware designed to spy on users, gain unauthorized access, and leak sensitive information. The worst part? These dangerous mods don’t look any different from legitimate ones. The deception is real, and the consequences are brutal.

NPM packages



If you think the danger is limited to shady download sites, think again. Cybercriminals have started using NPM packages, which are tools developers use for coding and software building. Hackers sneak malicious scripts into these packages, and when unsuspecting developers use them, they unknowingly install malware directly into their projects. Once inside, these rogue scripts log credentials, track activities, and expose entire systems. Imagine a hacker lurking in the background, watching every move, every login, every key you press. That’s what’s happening to victims of these malicious mods.

The illusion of a safe download



The trickiest part of this whole mess? These infected mods look completely legitimate. They might even have glowing reviews, fake upvotes, and seemingly active community engagement. Cybercriminals know that trust is key, so they craft their malware delivery with precision, making it incredibly difficult to distinguish safe from unsafe. The scariest part? Many victims never realize what happened until it’s too late—until their Roblox accounts are hijacked, their email credentials stolen, or their computer starts acting possessed.

Protect yourself



So, what’s the move? How do you avoid falling into these traps? The golden rule is simple—only download mods from trusted sources. If a download link comes from a random website or a sketchy forum, walk away. It doesn’t matter how cool the mod looks—if it isn’t verified, it’s a gamble you don’t want to take. Keeping antivirus software active and updated is another solid defense. Most modern antivirus programs can catch and block malicious scripts before they do real damage.

Another big one? Watch for weird permission requests. If a mod asks for access to files or controls that have nothing to do with gameplay, that’s a massive red flag. Why would a simple cosmetic mod need deep system access? It shouldn’t. And that’s exactly how you know something isn’t right.
