title: Common Roblox Issues and Fixes
image_title: RobloxGo - Common Roblox Issues and Fixes
image_alt: RobloxGo - Common Roblox Issues and Fixes - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Just like all other gaming platforms online, Roblox has its share of issues and problems that may come up when using or joining the platform. Let's take a quick look at some of the most common ones.
content_html:
Common Roblox Issues and Fixes

March 10, 2024 by jose
>
Just like all other gaming platforms online, Roblox has its share of issues and problems that may come up when using or joining the platform. Let's take a quick look at some of the most common ones.

As one of the most popular go-to games today, Roblox users and visitors occasionally experience several problems with the platform. It isn't perfect, and a few perplexing technical glitches will crop up here and there. When things like this happen, it is still best to keep one’s cool and figure out why such has happened.

With the number of people running around loose on the site and many more in the process of getting in, customer tech support can be difficult to come by at times. In these instances where waiting for them to get back or attend to you isn't a practical option, we can rely on several tips and advice on how to solve these common issues so one can get in and start having some serious fun.

How to Play Roblox


Many will probably laugh, but believe it or not, this is a very viable issue. From the youngest tot to the oldest senior, whoever gets curious about this thing called Roblox, where to begin is always the question.

Not everyone is computer savvy, especially the youngest to the most senior. Though almost everyone knows what a computer is and how to use it to a certain degree, getting into the Roblox platform can be daunting for many.

The first thing to do is to visit the site at roblox.com and sign up there. Just fill in the blanks and click sign up. Then, you will be instructed to install the Roblox client on your PC, which you will use to choose an experience and play it on the Roblox platform. If you get the installation right, which is mainly automatic (the PC will do it for you), you can log in to your account, create your profile and Roblox persona, and interact with other users.

After which, you can then check out the various experiences, as seen on Roblox Go, and start playing.

Installation Problems


Roblox is not easy to install, at least not for everyone.

Not all computers today are up-to-date with their OS, apps, plug-ins, and other essential programs and settings that will allow Roblox to install smoothly. Most of the time, there will be a bit of fuss in the installation process. This could be anything, from outdated security patches to outdated OS and other factors like firewalls, slow Internet, and anti-virus interference. Problems could go from simple to worse, with the worst being being unable to run Roblox on your computer.

As the installation runs, Roblox will alert you to any errors that may occur. You’ll often find out that Roblox doesn’t run after installation. The ultimate solution, however, is also the most frustrating of all.

Make sure you have the latest PC, OS, and updates to everything and anything—easier said than done. Sadly, for those of us who cannot keep up with popular influencers who seem to be able to afford the latest of all, we will have to troubleshoot our installation problems and do our best.

As soon as you start the installation process, follow the instructions here to make sure that you are doing it right. Roblox will generally tell you if there is an installation error or problem. The error is quite complex.

You must contact Roblox customer service if you don't want to try fixing it yourself. Should you go down the dirt road, my best advice is to use Google, Chat GPT, and the like. Either way, you'll have to exert extra effort with problems like this. You may even have to uninstall and reinstall several times as needed.

General connection problems


This is one problem that can plague many users worldwide: connecting smoothly to the Roblox servers. In many cases, a few things may be needed to achieve a good and reliable connection.

This may not be a problem for those who are in the US or good locations and have good internet bandwidth at the same time. Usually, however, a slow Internet service may be all it takes to ruin one’s day. Firewall and Browser settings can pose a problem as well, and should one overcome the said connection problems, factors like incomplete and problematic Roblox experiences due to design and coding flows can likewise hinder the ability to play on the platform.

First, check your Internet connection and its performance. Find out if there are problems with using wireless instead of the regular Ethernet/ Cable. Then, check the Firewall settings to ensure that the communication ports Roblox may use are open. You have two options: try to contact your ISP tech support and let them guide you in checking your firewalled connection ports and router settings to ensure no blockages, or let Google be your guiding light. Lastly, check your browser since Roblox is web-based.

Check if your browser is up to date, if the security settings are not too high (use your browser options), and if you have any ad blocker add-ons that can hinder Roblox experiences from loading.

Game and performance problems


So you've managed to get through the problems listed above. Then, you notice certain things are either not working or frustrating when trying to play a game.

There are many factors that can cause you grief in one way or another and prevent you from enjoying your Roblox experience. The most common are Chat and Keyboard issues. These are usually related to the settings for your keyboard (assuming that your keyboard is in good working condition and still isn't damaged by your constant banging on it).

Check the chat feature first by hitting the backslash key "\" to turn it on. If you still can't chat, go to your Windows desktop, open the Start Menu, go to Control Panel, and open the clock, language, and region tab. Open region and language and make sure format and location are adjusted to English and US. Let's say you get past these irritating obstacles, but you see a lot of hashtags instead of words on your chat; this only means that Roblox is filtering out the words or the registered age on the account. Again, if all else fails, do as the Romans do, Google it!

Problems with other users and the ecosystem itself


One of the most significant issues with Roblox is the human factor involved with the platform.

As mentioned in so many instances, not everyone is friendly, reasonable, and fair at Roblox. You will encounter issues from child and minor player verbal abuse to psychological abuse, scams of all sorts, bullying within the same age range, indecent proposals, as well as those psychos who get into the platform to steal, plunder, and grab credit in any way they can.

The obvious solution is to call customer service (patiently) and report any infraction (no matter how minor it looks) before the perpetrator can do it again. It's better to nip the bud at the start than let it grow and terrorize more unsuspecting people. Contact Roblox and let them help you with it. Check out how to do it here.

For more detailed information on how to deal with issues that can come up, you can visit the Roblox Help Page here.

title: Garden Egg Update in Adopt Me - How to Beat the New Minigame
image_title: RobloxGo - Garden Egg Update in Adopt Me - How to Beat the New Minigame
image_alt: RobloxGo - Garden Egg Update in Adopt Me - How to Beat the New Minigame - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Adopt Me has a pretty cool new Garden Egg update where you can adopt a plethora of pets and even go through a fun yet challenging garden-themed obstacle course!
content_html:
Garden Egg Update in Adopt Me - How to Beat the New Minigame

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
Adopt Me has a pretty cool new Garden Egg update where you can adopt a plethora of pets and even go through a fun yet challenging garden-themed obstacle course!

Robloxers rejoice! Adopt Me recently put up the new Garden Egg update, in which players can hatch and adopt a new set of cool pets and attempt to complete a pretty cool obstacle course. Like most updates, this one gives players a lot to fiddle around with, and players can adopt up to eight new pets, each with their own rarity levels. Before you start hatching eggs and redeeming rewards, though, finishing the minigame is undoubtedly pretty important, considering it gives you the event currency. What is the new minigame about? The new minigame is basically a set of obstacle courses aptly named Garden Courses. There are up to eight, with each spiking in difficulty as you progress. The aim is to collect Sundrops in every course; there are up to 10, and each stage corresponds to a multiplier. For example, if you finish the first stage, the Sundrops you collected will be multiplied by two, while on Stage 8, it will be x128. The Sundrops you earn will be used to redeem rewards from the Sunflower - you’ll need at least 5,000 Sundrops to do so. Accessing the new minigame You can access the Garden Hop Obby on Roblox Adopt Me through the Obby Building. From there, you can immediately proceed to a magical-looking door next to an NPC named Moss. Next to them is the sunflower, where you can redeem your rewards. Beating the Garden Hop Obby The Garden Hop obstacle courses are not exactly what you would call excruciatingly difficult. It’s relatively fun yet challenging - one mistimed hop or a misjudged jump can spell the end of your run. If you need a preview, take a look at the video walkthrough our staff here in RobloxGo made just for you: In a nutshell, the obstacle courses look and feel a little straightforward, but if you’re someone who wants to finish it all in one go, rushing may not be the best idea. Instead, it would be a better option to take it slow and time your jumps well. Once you get used to the controls and the general feel of the minigame, you can easily finish everything. However, even if it’s a lot more fun to rush everything, it’s more important to keep a keen eye so you won’t miss any of the Sundrops you’ll encounter. Rewards and obtainable pets The Garden Courses and the event, in general, will provide you with many rewards. Once you obtain 5,000 Sundrops, you can exchange your hard-earned event currency for a cute Garden Snake. Although it only has a common rarity, it’s definitely still a must-have, given that it’s quite new. Apart from this, you can also obtain an Uncommon Mole, along with the Legendary Golden Tortoise Beetle, by using eight keys to unlock the vault. Finally, if you manage to finish all eight stages, you’ll earn a badge named “Garden", which is a nice addition to your Roblox achievements.

title: Roblox Online Safety Tips Every Teen Should Know
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Online Safety Tips Every Teen Should Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox Online Safety Tips Every Teen Should Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: As one of the most visited gaming and experience platforms online, Roblox caters to all ages. However, everyone practically knows that there will always be dangers for almost everyone who goes online, especially for young people, even when it comes to Roblox.
content_html:
Roblox Online Safety Tips Every Teen Should Know

December 23, 2024 by jose
>
As one of the most visited gaming and experience platforms online, Roblox caters to all ages. However, everyone practically knows that there will always be dangers for almost everyone who goes online, especially for young people, even when it comes to Roblox.

The Roblox platform is open to everyone, regardless of age, race, creed, religion, and gender; it will be there if you're interested. The divergent mix of online users is as varied as its games, from action-packed shooters to social sims like Royale High. Unfortunately, hanging around Roblox will always present the risk of a rotten apple (or several) milling among the crowd.

Beware of this, especially for younger platform users. Kids have always been the most vulnerable crowd, but so are the preteens and teens. With this in mind, let's have a quick discussion on how elders can take steps and measures to keep tweens and teens safer on Roblox.

Cyberbullying


The most nefarious and weaponized action against (especially young) people on the Internet. Everyone can experience "Cyberbullying" in one form or another. Unlike adults, however, who have enough armor to deal with such threats, the young are quite vulnerable, and the teens are the most likely to experience this. Cyberbullying, though, is a broad term and may include a variety of aggressive and harmful behavior towards others online, like, for example, a Roblox experience.

Cyberbullying may include verbal harassment, gossiping and intrigue, character assassination, gaslighting, outright prejudice, hate speech, and, worst of all, scamming (whether it be in-game items or actual cash). There was even a case of a missing teen who was victimized by a certified low-life perpetrating on the platform. The dangers and the fact that Roblox is mostly populated by the young make it a playground for users of ill-repute who will continue to peddle their bad vibes as long as they can get away with it.

The Teen Struggle


Both parents and elders should always be aware of how their young ones are doing. Teenagers, again, are especially vulnerable during this age of physical, mental, and emotional adjustments. They also need assistance and protection from the older ones who love them. So, whether they like it or not, it is an elder's responsibility to keep a keen eye on and look out for them.

If a teen is being harassed, it will show up one way or another. Changes in mood, sudden secrecy, isolation, anger and irritability, a decline in academic performance, psychosomatic symptoms, and illnesses—the list can be varied and long. Regardless, elders have to keep an eye on things like this, and when observed, action has to be taken to get to the root of the problematic behavior.

Parental Intervention


Once a parent or elder has determined or suspected that one's teen is being scandalized online, it would be time for decisive action. The best way is to jump into Roblox itself and either join your kid in games like BedWars or do your own shadowing. Perpetrators may be wary of a parent tagging along and may even use this to harass your teen more. A good strategy is to provide your teen with some backup assistance during gameplay. If you, the elder or parent, don't have the time to shadow your kid in Roblox, you will need help from a gameplay surrogate.

Teenagers are teens, and the best people who can back them up are teens as well. A good and caring friend or group may be one of the best protections against perpetrators. There are many instances on Roblox where a bunch of other kids/teens will come to the aid of a bullied kid and gang up on the cyberbully. After all, bullying goes both ways, and one thing that legit players on Roblox do not like is cyberbullying.

As a parent, getting to know your teen's pals (offline and online) is a must. They are the ones who can go and see where you can't and give you an update on whatever happens. Even if sworn to secrecy, there will always be one whose conscience will overpower them to the point of fessing up. Teens are teens, and so it goes. So it is wise to know as many of your teen's friends as possible.

Talking To Your kid


The most important aspect of a teen's life is getting to know and accept one's self-worth, and a very crucial aspect of this is having a strong and stable bond with the people they love. This means trust, and that should be the foremost case between the teen and their parents or guardian elders. As the guardian, you must have a heart-to-heart talk with your teen and assure them they are loved no matter what.

Elicit a confession about the problem and then discuss how to solve it. The objective is to provide the shield needed by your vulnerable young from cyberbullies, scammers, predators, and other rotten mangoes on the platform. If a misdeed has been committed, it should be reported to the platform authorities, and the offending party should get what it deserves. Establishing a safe environment for your teen without being too incursive to their gameplay should be the top priority, with totally pulling them out from the platform as a last resort.

Finally, instruct your teen what to do whenever and if cyberbullying happens again. It is best to teach them how to arm themselves and be ready for the reality of the world we all now live in. Make them understand they are not alone and have peers and elders who have their backs when unsavory events strike. Teens are teens, and they will be adults in time, and it would be good to train them for it.

Safe Hangouts For teens


Finally, there are places in Roblox that are considered to be safe havens for kids and teens to wander about. As it is the holidays, teens can visit The 5 Christmas Hangout Ideas on Roblox to get good ideas to do this Christmas on Roblox. There are other good experiences where they would be unlikely to get bullied.

title: Brookhaven Hacker House - How to Find the Secret Safe
image_title: RobloxGo - Brookhaven Hacker House - How to Find the Secret Safe
image_alt: RobloxGo - Brookhaven Hacker House - How to Find the Secret Safe - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Finding the secret safe in Hacker House in Brookhaven RP requires a bit of searching, but luckily, our staff is here to help you get this done.
content_html:
Brookhaven Hacker House - How to Find the Secret Safe

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
Finding the secret safe in Hacker House in Brookhaven RP requires a bit of searching, but luckily, our staff is here to help you get this done.

Brookhaven RP RP in Roblox is known for having lots of secrets, and we’re sure not all of them have been found. The secrets attest to the developers’ commitment to bringing you the best and most diverse content. With this in mind, our staff here in Robloxgo decided to produce a video guide to help you unlock many of Hacker House’s secrets. The Secret Safe Location in Hacker House: What is it about? Spy thrillers are a common theme in many games, with many movies, novels, and TV shows featuring this. The same can be said about Roblox, particularly Brookhaven RP, since it has its own Hacker House, which is something straight off of a spy thriller. Now available via a recent update in Brookhaven RP, having a Hacker House lets you live your espionage fantasies on Roblox, letting you engage in activities akin to a modern version of James Bond, albeit from behind a computer screen. Hacker House: Entrance and interior Once a Hacker House is built, it looks like an inconspicuous bit of land. However, there’s more to it than meets the eye. There are a couple of entrances, including the garage, which opens when you push a button, and the secret stairs at the back of the lot. Once you enter via this location, step into the elevator entrance door, go down, and voila, you’ve entered the Hacker House! The interior is something straight off of a spy movie and can double as an evil genius’ lair. Inside, it is a map of the world, computers, books, and servers - just about everything a spy/hacker needs to perform covert operations. Oh, and it has a soda machine and a microwave, so we can safely say everything is complete. Finding the Secret Hacker Room Finding the secret safe requires you to perform the first crucial step, which is obtaining the blue keycard nestled on the center table. From there, head over to the bathroom, where you can use the blue key card on a glowing blue device attached to the wall. The wall will then open, and voila, you’ve found the secret hacker room! Inside it is a server and a more powerful computer. Secret entrances and the safe The first secret entrance you can find is right above the bookshelf and behind the LED map. It does not lead to anything in particular, but if you’re planning a redesign or to add a secret stash, it seems useful. The next secret entrance is right above the couch, which ultimately leads to the secret safe. Once you enter it, you’ll be in a labyrinthine cavern you have to navigate. Check out our video below to find out how to locate the safe: Once you’ve found the safe, you can obtain cash and exit the maze. The third secret entrance, is right behind the server in the hacker room. Simply climb on top of the server, and you’ll enter what seems to be a massive, unfinished room with lots of space. There are parts there where you can walk through walls. In addition, there are also secret cameras inside that let you monitor your home, which come in handy if there are unwanted invaders.

title: Roblox Child Safety Updates - Everything You Need to Know
image_title: RobloxGo - Roblox Child Safety Updates - Everything You Need to Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - Roblox Child Safety Updates - Everything You Need to Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: After facing allegations about their platform compromising child safety, the popular gaming company Roblox steps up to overhaul its protective measures against online predators.
content_html:
Roblox Child Safety Updates - Everything You Need to Know

November 18, 2024 by Cels
>
After facing allegations about their platform compromising child safety, the popular gaming company Roblox steps up to overhaul its protective measures against online predators.

Last September 2024, Roblox celebrated its 18th anniversary, which is a major milestone for a gaming platform that has weathered intense competition across multiple video game generations. Roblox currently hosts a whopping 40 million games, with a growing number of aspiring developers testing their mettle on Roblox by creating more content every year. According to an article by The Shelf, Roblox is home to over 70 million active users, with 42.3% of them being under the age of 13. Considering that most of its games have simplified graphics reminiscent of Lego and Minecraft, it’s no surprise that Roblox will attract such a number of younger players through some of the top games in the Roblox charts, like Blox Fruits, Adopt Me!, Brookhaven RP, and Tower of Hell. It's important to note that these games attract a wide variety of players of different age ranges. While the team behind Roblox enjoys the platform’s continuous success, a recent report by the US investment firm Hindenburg Research raised some safety concerns about Roblox’s online environment.

Hindenburg Research vs. Roblox Corporation

The Guardian, in one of its posts, described in detail how Hindenburg Research accused Roblox of being a site that could attract lawbreakers. The group also added that many Roblox games contain inappropriate content that isn’t suitable for younger players, and some of the accounts they found use disturbing IGNs that are either subtly vulgar or are inspired by controversial figures. The statement from Hindenburg Research caught the attention of various publications, leading to Roblox receiving public backlash and criticisms regarding its current child safety features. In retaliation, Roblox rejected all the claims from the firm, reiterating that they invested heavily in its trust and safety efforts, and as a result, they were able to implement robust and proactive measures for combating any form of harmful activity on Roblox.

Roblox’s Reaction to the Hindenburg Report

To further reiterate its commitment to protecting its younger users, Roblox announced a significant improvement to its existing child user policy. Roblox players who are under 13 will be required to seek permission from their parents before they can use some of the platform’s chat features. Moreover, Roblox will also design new types of accounts for parents to monitor their children’s activity on the platform. Players that are younger than nine will be given further restrictions by the company. Every user under the mentioned age group won’t be allowed to play games that incorporate inappropriate themes unless they have the permission of their parents as well. As a way to reinforce the latest changes to their policies, Roblox recently enforced a rule that directly affected game creators. Every creator must answer a questionnaire for each game that they want to be played by users under 13. The questionnaire shall be submitted by December 3, 2024, and all unrated games will be automatically filtered out of search in Roblox, making them unplayable by the users of the said age group.

title: Everything You Need to Know About Roblox Premium Membership
image_title: RobloxGo - Everything You Need to Know About Roblox Premium Membership
image_alt: RobloxGo - Everything You Need to Know About Roblox Premium Membership - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Roblox Premium is here! Find out if this monthly service gets you more out of playing Experiences.
content_html:
Everything You Need to Know About Roblox Premium Membership

March 3, 2025 by JamesVince
>
Roblox Premium is here! Find out if this monthly service gets you more out of playing Experiences.

The budget-minded Robloxian will find this new feature a blessing. Now, instead of keeping tabs in fear of burning Robux mindlessly, players are given a more controlled option in Roblox Premium. This membership scheme also comes with bonuses and perks that make the subscription worth your while.

Pricing

There are 3 subscription tiers, each named after the amount of Robux you get monthly. They are currently Premium 450, Premium 1000, and Premium 2200. They are charged according to country or region and are subject to taxation rules. Available payment methods include all major credit and debit cards. Prepaid credit cards can also go through, depending on the service provider. Paypal transactions and the use of Roblox Gift Cards also let you pay for a Premium membership. Mobile users can pay for Premium using Google Play, iTunes, and Amazon.

Metaverse perks

To sweeten these renewable deals, Robloxians who avail of premium get these bonuses. The first of these is access to exclusive Roblox Avatar Shop items. Premium members also get discounts on specific items. Who knows? Maybe that Avatar item you’ve been holding off on buying is within your reach. Members also get to enjoy the trading room, where they can barter or resell any bought avatar items stored away and never seen in use. Some Experiences provide access to Premium member-only content. Having an active membership lets you enjoy a part of the game unavailable to non-Premium players. If you’re a frequent player of big live-service Roblox titles, chances are a Premium-only benefit is waiting for you to discover it.

Adding Premium to your account

Premium membership activation differs based on what you are using to access it. If you’re about to get Premium from Roblox Player, tap the Robux icon beside your Robloxian username. Scroll down the menu until “Get Premium” appears. Click the blue rectangle to be directed to the landing page for making payments. The default offer that appears is Premium 1000. The mobile version is similar to using the desktop launcher in many ways. Simply find the Robux symbol like you would to top up, and scroll down the packages until you find Subscribe and Get More. Tapping the blue rectangle takes you to the consent acknowledgment page. Read the stipulations (if you haven’t done this before) and tap Purchase to proceed with the in-app payment. Be reminded that only Premium 1000 is available for activation. Google Play users can cancel their active membership by accessing the Play Store, tapping their account profile picture, and going to Payments and Subscriptions. Using a web browser is the best option at the moment. After signing in to the Roblox website, click the menu button at the top left of the page. At the bottom of the selection, you’ll find “Get Premium.” This takes you to the Premium membership page. After a quick read of what you’ll get, you can pick one of the three membership tiers available and proceed with payment. Roblox Premium is a straightforward subscription system loaded with advantages that avid Roblox avatar collectors and long-time Robloxians will enjoy. Log on to Roblox Go for more of the best and latest in the voxel world!

title: Natural Disaster Survival on Roblox - Everything You Need to Know
image_title: RobloxGo - Natural Disaster Survival on Roblox - Everything You Need to Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - Natural Disaster Survival on Roblox - Everything You Need to Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: It’s one of Roblox’s classics, and in this article, we’ll be delving deep into the best things that Natural Disaster Survival has to offer.
content_html:
Natural Disaster Survival on Roblox - Everything You Need to Know

August 15, 2024 by abdullah
>
It’s one of Roblox’s classics, and in this article, we’ll be delving deep into the best things that Natural Disaster Survival has to offer.

It’s one of those Roblox games that people keep coming back to as it features on Roblox Charts as well. If you’re into Roblox, chances are you’ve played Natural Disaster Survival, or at least heard about it. The game is all about one thing: surviving through different disasters. Sounds simple, but it’s surprisingly addictive. The concept? You and other players are placed in a location, and then a disaster strikes. Tornadoes, tsunamis, acid rain—anything goes. Your job? Stay alive until it’s over.

The Gameplay is where it Shines



The gameplay is what makes Natural Disaster Survival so fun. In every round, you’re just dropped into a new map to play on. Now, this map could be a beach, a farm, or even a glass tower and once you’re there, you simply have to wait and see what’s in store for you because any disaster could be on the way. Nobody knows until it happens. Maybe it’s a volcano erupting right next to you. Maybe it’s lightning. Maybe a tsunami is on the way. Whatever it is, you have to think fast. Where should you go? What’s the best place to hide? The map can crumble around you as buildings fall and floors disappear. You’ve got to stay sharp and avoid the chaos.

Controls are super basic. Move around, jump, find cover. It’s all about figuring out where to go and what to avoid. If you get it wrong, you’ll be wiped out quickly. The thing about Natural Disaster Survival is that every round is going to be really fast paced and, if you fail once, you’ll get respawned again so you’ll have another chance to have a go and see how long you can actually survive.

Feature-Filled



If you ask us what makes this game so different from the rest, the answer is definitely the monotonous nature of the game as how unpredictable it is. You simply don’t know what’s coming next because, one minute you might feel safe and the next, you’re trying to avoid boiling hot Lava. The randomness keeps it fresh, even after dozens of rounds. Every disaster is a new challenge.

The game is even better with friends. The chaos is more fun when you’re trying to outlive your buddies. They might be running for cover, and you’re laughing as they get launched by debris. It’s lighthearted, even in the middle of the mayhem. That’s the charm—there’s a lot of humor mixed with the danger. It’s a perfect balance. One of the reasons this game is so popular is its simplicity because, you wouldn’t really have to spend hours learning about the game.

A Visual Fest



The graphics are classic Roblox. You know what to expect—blocky, colorful, and simple. It doesn’t aim for realism. Instead, it sticks to that familiar Roblox style. The maps are creative, each with its own look. You could be on a construction site one round and in a sunny field the next. Bright colors contrast with the disasters, giving it that quirky, fun feel. When disasters hit, the visuals really take off. Seeing a tornado rip through a building or watching a flash flood rise while players scramble is part of the experience. It’s not about fancy graphics—it’s about watching the chaos unfold in a way that’s both thrilling and funny.

All in all, Natural Disaster Survival remains a top choice for Roblox players. It’s easy to jump into, filled with unpredictable fun, and the visuals fit the game perfectly.

title: Phantom Forces on PC - Gameplay, Features, and Tips
image_title: RobloxGo - Phantom Forces on PC - Gameplay, Features, and Tips
image_alt: RobloxGo - Phantom Forces on PC - Gameplay, Features, and Tips - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: FPS’s don’t come much better than this and in this article, we’ll be discussing this Roblox masterpiece in detail.
content_html:
Phantom Forces on PC - Gameplay, Features, and Tips

July 31, 2024 by abdullah
>
FPS’s don’t come much better than this and in this article, we’ll be discussing this Roblox masterpiece in detail.

From RobloxGo’s massive universe, we’ve picked a gem to cover today. When we talk about FPS games on RobloxGo, Phantom Forces simply cannot be ignored. It excels in every single department and offers an intense experience that players from all over the world love. In this article, we’ll be diving deep into some of the game’s standout aspects to see what sets it apart from so many other games of this genre.

Intense Firefights: The Core of Phantom Forces

Let’s get right into the mix of things. The gameplay of Phantom Forces is what makes this a masterpiece. It’s basically a battle for supremacy in the game, and this team-based game is where the Security Force and the Insurgents battle it out in intense shooting marathons. The objective is simple: eliminate the opposing team or capture the objective point. Now, you might be thinking that this is the case in many FPS games, but there’s a lot more to the game. The tactical experience is a memorable one, as you’ll need to be really cunning around the battlefield to help your team’s winning cause. When we say it stands out, we mean it. The maps in the game are designed so amazingly that every single battle in the game feels intense and exhilarating, ranging from urban battlegrounds to expansive industrial complexes. You’ll need to be so adaptable to work in accordance with each map and, this tactical adaptability is what tests your skills. Whether you prefer long-range sniping, close-quarters combat, or a balanced approach, there's a playstyle for everyone.

Combat and Shooting Mechanics: A Realistic Feel

A good FPS rewards accuracy and timing, and that’s what Phantom Forces is all about. The combat is one of the biggest strengths of the game. You’ll need to master how you’re supposed to handle the weapon and how to manage the recoil for each weapon because all of this impacts your performance on the battlefield. Making this a cut above the rest is the stunning variety of weapons. The weapon loadout is going to leave you confused because there’s just so much to choose from to annihilate your opponents.

Features That Keep You Coming Back

In-game features should always be top-tier because the game should offer content variety, and Phantom Forces shines in this department as well. As you gain experience, you unlock new weapons, attachments, and cosmetics. The game also features a ranking system, allowing you to climb the ranks as you improve your skills. Moving on to other things, there’s variety in game modes as well. Another standout feature is the variety of game modes. In addition to the standard team deathmatch, there are modes like Domination and Control Point, offering different gameplay experiences. The ability to customize your loadout is essential, and Phantom Forces delivers on this front.

Visuals: A Solid Foundation

The visual experience cannot really be described as ground-breaking but, it does the job and keeps players immersed. The environments are detailed enough to provide a sense of immersion, and the character models are decent. The good thing is, visual aren’t that demanding which means even if you’re system is not up to the par hardware-wise, you’ll be able to enjoy the flashy world of Phantom Forces.

content_html:
Hidden Places You Can Visit in Roblox Blox Fruits

July 16, 2024 by abdullah
>
The world of Blox Fruits is a huge one and, in this article, we’ll be discussing some secret places that you can visit in Roblox’s Blox Fruits.

Roblox Blox Fruits is a hit sensation that has millions of players. A game that presents an awesome and immersive open-world experience, wherein players turn themselves into fruit users having powerful abilities, explore different islands, and engage in epic battles. After all, Blox Fruits is a game with a lot to discover due to the massiveness of the game world, so it shouldn't come as any surprise that there's a pretty large fanbase out there in constant search of these kinds of details to explore something new. In this article, we'll go through some of the secret places you can explore in Blox Fruits, each with its own charm and hidden treasures.

Magma Village

Magma Village is the hidden gem in Blox Fruits. It is located in the First Sea, constituting a village situated on a rocky zone full of volcanoes, giving it a really characteristic environment. The village is one of its kinds since players get an opportunity to find the Magma Fruit and hence have dominant abilities in controlling and manipulating magma. In addition, it has a number of strong enemies and quests that can help players level up and gain valuable experience.

Turtle Entrance

One of the secret spots that was let out is The Turtle Entrance. This entrance, found in the Second Sea, takes its players into an underwater world where the very legendary Turtle Fruit can be found. This fruit changes a player into a turtle with distinctive defense and the power to control water. The entrance carries another reputation from a time past, which is a place of great hidden tunnels and secret passageways; it is indeed a perfect place for the adventurous to explore.

Hydro Arena

The Hydro Arena is another secret location in the Second Sea that unfolds unique combat mechanics to the players. Located underwater, this fighting area has been designed for the heaviest of combat against dangerous water-based enemies and challenging bosses. The special thing about the Hydro Arena is the environment of high risk and high reward, in which a player can test their skills. It is a must place to prove the mettle in battle for any player who wants to come out with unique and rare items.

Haunted Castle

The Haunted Castle is one of those creepy locations in the Third Sea. It is actually kind of a thrilling place, with its castle in darkness and full of creepy enemies. The Haunted Castle is special in that it allows players to find the Ghost Fruit; such fruit will allow its consumers to become invisible and permeate objects. Apart from a very special fruit growing in the castle, it also holds secret quests and rare treasures—an ideal goal for daring seekers.

Marine Fort

Marine Fort is one of those maximum security fortresses in the First Sea where most of the secrets are held. That is unique because it is a site that players can seek on for Marine Fruit, which gives them exceptional fighting ability and the ability to summon marine creatures besides. Also found there are tough enemies and challenging quests that will give a player numerous chances to get increased in level and have their abilities sharpened to perfection.

Peanut Land

Peanut Land is a whimsical and truly original place in the Second Sea. Relatively comical, focused on one thing – peanuts. It is populated with the Peanut Fruit, allowing users to control and manifest peanuts for combat. With playful enemies and entertaining quests, this area is lively, making it a great place to take a break from more intensive gameplay. All in all, this would draw the conclusion that Blox Fruits possesses a lot of secret places which offer unique experiences and hidden treasures. From the fiery Magma Village to the whimsical Peanut Land, players are offered something new in each place. It's no surprise that it's one of the top 100 games in the Roblox charts, making it something you should dive into.

title: Jailbreak on Roblox - How to Play and What to Expect
image_title: RobloxGo - Jailbreak on Roblox - How to Play and What to Expect
image_alt: RobloxGo - Jailbreak on Roblox - How to Play and What to Expect - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Executing precise police raids is what it’s all about, and today we’re diving deep into one of Roblox’s finest, Jailbreak.
content_html:
Jailbreak on Roblox - How to Play and What to Expect

July 3, 2024 by abdullah
>
Executing precise police raids is what it’s all about, and today we’re diving deep into one of Roblox’s finest, Jailbreak.

Robloxgo boasts a vast library of experiences catering to diverse interests. Among these gems shines Jailbreak, a 12-time award-winning title that has captivated millions of players with its thrilling cops and robbers premise. Today, we delve deep into the world of Jailbreak, exploring its core gameplay, unique features, and the immersive environment it creates.

Gearing Up for the Heist: Gameplay and Premise


Jailbreak throws players into the heart of a high-stakes heist. You choose your side: become a cunning criminal mastermind or a vigilant police officer. Criminals team up to orchestrate daring escapes from a heavily guarded prison. Their objective? To rob banks, jewelry stores, and other lucrative locations scattered across the expansive map. Success hinges on teamwork, quick thinking, and mastering a variety of vehicles used for getaways.

Police officers, on the other hand, work together to maintain law and order. They patrol the streets, apprehend criminals, and prevent robberies. Their arsenal includes handcuffs, tasers, and an array of high-speed police vehicles to chase down fleeing criminals. The core gameplay loop thrives on this dynamic tension, with criminals constantly outsmarting police tactics and officers thwarting elaborate escape plans.

Modes and Features: Beyond the Heist


Jailbreak isn't just about pulling off the perfect heist or capturing criminals. It offers a wealth of features and modes to keep the gameplay fresh and exciting. The map is brimming with an impressive selection of vehicles, including sports cars, muscle cars, helicopters, and even monster trucks. Each vehicle offers unique handling and performance, allowing players to tailor their approach to the situation. Criminals can use these vehicles to outrun the police, while police officers rely on their own high-performance cruisers to chase down fleeing suspects.

Jailbreak allows players to personalize their characters with a wide assortment of clothing, accessories, and even animations. Earning in-game currency unlocks new customization options, letting players express their unique style. From sleek police uniforms to flamboyant criminal outfits, the possibilities are endless. The game encourages strategic planning for criminals. Hidden around the map are blueprints that reveal the layout and security measures of various robbery locations. Studying these blueprints allows criminals to strategize their approach, increasing their chances of a successful heist.

Jailbreak keeps things interesting with frequent seasonal updates. These updates introduce new vehicles, locations, gadgets, and even thematic events, ensuring players have a continuous stream of fresh content to explore.

A Visually Striking World


Jailbreak isn't just about action-packed gameplay; it also boasts a visually appealing environment. The map is vast and detailed, featuring a vibrant cityscape with towering skyscrapers, sprawling suburbs, and a sprawling network of roads. The prison itself is meticulously designed, with imposing walls, security checkpoints, and hidden tunnels waiting to be discovered. Whether you're speeding down the highway in a stolen sports car or engaging in a tense shootout near the bank, Jailbreak's visuals create a captivating atmosphere that amplifies the thrill of the game.

Maintaining a Fair Playing Field: Jailbreak's Anti-Cheating Stance


One of the most commendable aspects of Jailbreak is its commitment to fair play. The developers at Badimo Studios have implemented strict anti-cheating measures to ensure everyone enjoys a balanced and enjoyable experience. Jailbreak actively bans cheaters who attempt to exploit the game with unauthorized modifications or hacks. This dedication to a level playing field fosters a healthy and competitive environment where success relies solely on skill and strategy.

title: Independence Day on Roblox - Tips and Tricks to Celebrate
image_title: RobloxGo - Independence Day on Roblox - Tips and Tricks to Celebrate
image_alt: RobloxGo - Independence Day on Roblox - Tips and Tricks to Celebrate - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: RobloxGo is the place to enjoy every festival and every occasion and we’re here with some tips and tricks to help you celebrate independence day on RobloxGo.
content_html:
Independence Day on Roblox - Tips and Tricks to Celebrate

July 2, 2024 by abdullah
>
RobloxGo is the place to enjoy every festival and every occasion and we’re here with some tips and tricks to help you celebrate independence day on RobloxGo.

Roblox is a haven for all kinds of celebrations. With the 4th of July just around the corner, it's the perfect platform to unleash your inner patriot and celebrate America's birthday in style. Whether you're a seasoned Robloxian or a curious newcomer, this guide will equip you with all the tips and tricks to have a firecracker of a time on Independence Day! First things first, let's deck you out in some red, white, and blue! Head over to the Roblox avatar editor and get ready to spark some fashion patriotism. Here are our recommendations here at RobloxGo:

Grab Hold of the Independence Day Cap

Roblox often releases limited-edition items for special occasions, and Independence Day is no exception. Keep an eye out for the special Independence Day Cap – a virtual topper that screams "America!" It's the perfect way to show your patriotic spirit and let everyone in the Roblox world know you're celebrating. You can get this cap and standout in the world of RobloxGo and, not to forget, flaunt your wardrobe in the best possible way.

Wear Your Colors Proudly

Even if you don't snag the limited-edition cap, there are tons of other ways to dress up for the 4th of July on Roblox. Browse the avatar editor's extensive collection of hats, shirts, pants, and accessories. Look for items in red, white, and blue, or go all out with a full-on Uncle Sam costume complete with a top hat and a beard (well, as close as Roblox avatars can get to facial hair!).

Join the Independence Day Festivities

The beauty of Roblox is that the community is constantly creating new experiences. During Independence Day, many popular games might host special events or updates. Games like Brookhaven, known for its open-world town vibes, might transform their maps with festive decorations or host in-game fireworks displays. Keep your eyes peeled for announcements from your favorite Roblox YouTubers or content creators, as they might be hosting special Independence Day events on their servers.

Celebrate with Your Squad

Roblox is all about connecting with friends, and there's no better way to celebrate Independence Day than with your online squad. Gather your fellow Roblox enthusiasts, throw on your patriotic avatars, and head over to your favorite game. Whether it's building a virtual barbecue in Backyard BBQ, racing to the finish line in a star-spangled race game, or just hanging out and chatting with fireworks exploding in the background, being together makes the celebration even more special. If you can't celebrate in person with friends or family, consider video chatting while you play on Roblox – it's the next best thing to being together!

Light Up the Night

Many Roblox games incorporate a day/night cycle, and some even feature spectacular virtual firework displays come nightfall. Find a game with a great night sky view and gather your friends for a virtual fireworks extravaganza. It might not be the same as the real thing, but it's a unique way to celebrate together in the digital world. So there you have it! With a little creativity and these tips in mind, you can transform your Roblox experience into an unforgettable Independence Day celebration.

title: BedWars Strategies - How to Win Every Match
image_title: RobloxGo - BedWars Strategies - How to Win Every Match
image_alt: RobloxGo - BedWars Strategies - How to Win Every Match - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Scroll through this article because we’ve brought some exclusive strategies for you to win and get better in Roblox’s BedWars.
content_html:
BedWars Strategies - How to Win Every Match

June 13, 2024 by Skyrus
>
Scroll through this article because we’ve brought some exclusive strategies for you to win and get better in Roblox’s BedWars.

RobloxGo, a treasure trove of user-generated games, boasts some real gems. Among these, BedWars stands out as a thrilling and strategic battle royale experience. This fast-paced game pits teams against each other on isolated islands, with the ultimate goal of destroying the opposing team's bed – the source of their respawns. Whether you're a seasoned BedWars veteran or a curious newcomer, victory can feel elusive. But fear not, fellow warriors! Here are four key strategies to sharpen your skills and dominate the arena.

Mastering the Early Rush: Gearing Up for Glory

The first moments of a Bedwars match are crucial. A well-executed early rush can give your team a significant advantage. Try prioritizing iron! As soon as you spawn, grab some wood and mine for iron. This allows you to quickly craft essential tools like a stone pickaxe and a sword. While diamonds are tempting, early iron is essential for defense and offense. “Bridge and Battle” is another useful technique, though. Work with your team to construct a bridge towards the nearest enemy island. Communication is key here – coordinate your build to ensure a swift and efficient path. Once the bridge is complete, engage in a coordinated attack. Remember, teamwork makes the dream work (of destroying beds)! Also, before venturing out, don't forget to protect your own bed! Leave one teammate behind to fortify your defenses with blocks and fences. This will prevent a sneak attack while your team focuses on the offensive.

Exploring the Islands: Resources and Riches Await

The central islands are a treasure trove of resources. While venturing out can be risky, the rewards are substantial. Diamond generators provide the resources for powerful diamond gear. Fight your way to the center of the map and secure some diamonds for yourself and your teammates. Furthermore, Emeralds are the currency of BedWars, used to purchase potions, powerful tools, and even special abilities. Seek out emerald generators and collect them strategically. Remember, sometimes it's better to gather resources and prepare for a later fight than to risk everything in a diamond-fueled brawl. Don’t forget not to be reckless! If you find yourself outnumbered or outmatched, retreat back to your island and regroup. There's no shame in living to fight another day (and another respawn).

Building for Success: Offense, Defense, and Beyond

Building strategically is the cornerstone of BedWars success. When attacking, build a bridge to the enemy island, but don't stop there. Encase their bed in a box of obsidian or cobblestone to prevent them from easily respawning and defending. Remember, a well-placed block can make all the difference. On your home island, consider building a tower to gain a height advantage. This allows you to spot enemies approaching, rain down arrows from above, and defend your bed more effectively.

Practice. Practice. And a bit more Practice!

There's no substitute for practice. Before diving into team games, test the waters in solo mode. This allows you to focus on your individual skills like resource gathering, combat, and building. Watch how other skilled players approach the game. Pay attention to their building techniques, combat strategies, and resource management. Don't be afraid to adapt your own tactics based on what you observe.

title: Work at a Pizza Place - Job Roles and How to Master Them
image_title: RobloxGo - Work at a Pizza Place - Job Roles and How to Master Them
image_alt: RobloxGo - Work at a Pizza Place - Job Roles and How to Master Them - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Scroll through this article to get some guidance to play the famous game, Work at a Pizza Place, as we assess every job on in the game.
content_html:
Work at a Pizza Place - Job Roles and How to Master Them

March 7, 2024 by Skyrus
>
Scroll through this article to get some guidance to play the famous game, Work at a Pizza Place, as we assess every job on in the game.

Work at a Pizza Place stands as one of the most iconic and beloved games on the Roblox platform, captivating players with its immersive gameplay and collaborative experience. In this virtual world, players step into the shoes of various roles within a bustling pizza restaurant, working together to fulfill orders and keep customers satisfied. With its engaging gameplay mechanics and vibrant community, it's no wonder that Work at a Pizza Place has become a staple of the Roblox gaming landscape. In this article, we’ll closely assess every job that’s in the game and briefly explain what each of these people do.

Cashier


As the first point of contact for customers, the cashier is responsible for taking orders, handling transactions, and ensuring that customers have a pleasant dining experience. Quick thinking and excellent customer service skills are essential for success in this role and, not to forget, the cashier team will be in Red.

Cook


The Cook role is central to the pizza-making process, stationed in the kitchen behind the cashier booth. Cooks meticulously prepare pizzas, adding toppings and baking them to perfection before placing them on the conveyor belt. It's important to note that Fizzly sodas should not be cooked; instead, they can simply be placed on the conveyor belt for delivery. Represented by the color yellow, the Cook plays a vital role in ensuring that customers receive delicious, freshly-made pizzas in this vibrant virtual world.

Pizza Boxer


There’s a key role focused on packaging pizzas into boxes and placing them on the conveyor in the Pizza Boxing Room. This job ensures that pizzas are neatly packed and ready for delivery. Additionally, Fizzly sodas can be placed directly onto the conveyor without any further preparation. Identified by the color orange, members of this team play a crucial part in the smooth operation of the pizza-making process, ensuring that orders are prepared efficiently and accurately for customer satisfaction.

Delivery


The name is self-explanatory. This role is tasked with delivering pizzas to houses based on the house number displayed on the pizza's icon in the Hotbar. This team is identified by the color blue.

Supplier


There's a crucial role responsible for loading supply boxes onto a truck and transporting them to the Supply Vacuum at the supply depot via a conveyor. Identified by the color white, members of this team ensure that essential supplies are efficiently delivered to keep the restaurant stocked and running smoothly.

Manager


The manager is a role with the authority to grant bonuses, select an Employee of the Day, reassign tasks, or remove a worker from the team through a vote kick process. With the introduction of the Star System update, the Manager now has the ability to terminate employees who consistently receive zero stars. Identified by the color green, this team ensures smooth operations and maintains a productive work environment within the restaurant.

On Break


This role allows players to enter a state of break by starting at a house, being AFK, or being outside of the pizzeria. While on break, players cannot earn coins or receive paychecks. Identified by the color gray, this position provides players with a temporary respite from active tasks, allowing them to relax or tend to personal matters without impacting their in-game progress.

We hope you found this guide helpful and, whether you’re a first timer or have been playing the game, you’ll surely find this guide helpful.

title: 4 Army Games on Roblox You Can Play on Memorial Day
image_title: RobloxGo - 4 Army Games on Roblox You Can Play on Memorial Day
image_alt: RobloxGo - 4 Army Games on Roblox You Can Play on Memorial Day - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: While Memorial Day honors fallen heroes, military-themed games can add a layer of strategy and learning to your pre-holiday cookout so let’s explore a few military games on RobloxGo.
content_html:
4 Army Games on Roblox You Can Play on Memorial Day

April 22, 2024 by abdullah
>
While Memorial Day honors fallen heroes, military-themed games can add a layer of strategy and learning to your pre-holiday cookout so let’s explore a few military games on RobloxGo.

Gear up for Memorial Day with a blast from the barracks! Military-themed games aren't just about action; they can build teamwork, strategy skills, and even spark conversations about service and sacrifice. As Memorial Day approaches, why not honor the brave with some virtual salutes? Roblox offers a massive arsenal of military-themed games, perfect for squad-based fun or strategic solo missions. From historical battles to modern warfare, we're deploying a guide to a few of the best military experiences Roblox has to offer. So, grab your gear and get ready.

Skirmish


Skirmish throws you into bite-sized battles perfect for a quick fix. Choose your team and class, soldier, sniper, or grenadier, each with unique strengths. Matches are fast-paced with a focus on objective-based combat. Capture points, defend zones, or eliminate the enemy team – teamwork is key to victory. Combat is a frantic spray of bullets and explosions. While aiming can feel loose, the colorful maps and constant action make for a purely chaotic and undeniably fun experience. If you're looking for a quick shot of adrenaline-pumping action, Skirmish delivers a satisfying punch.

Criminal vs SWAT


Criminal vs SWAT offers a classic team deathmatch with a twist: choose your side! Become a law-enforcing SWAT officer or a cunning criminal. Each side boasts a unique arsenal – criminals wield pistols, shotguns, and rocket launchers, while SWAT packs heat with assault rifles, snipers, and even grenades. Combat is frantic and chaotic, with bullets whizzing through destructible environments. The variety in weapons and objectives keeps things interesting. While the graphics are blocky and the experience might feel a tad repetitive after a while, Criminals vs SWAT provides a solid dose of shooting fun.

Noob Army Tycoon


In Noob Army Tycoon, forget building a lemonade stand – you're building an army of noobs! This quirky tycoon flips the script. Here, you amass an army of goofy noobs to conquer strategic points on a map. Combat is lighthearted and automated – noobs simply march and attack. But the strategy comes in choosing the right upgrades and completing wacky "Super Noob" quests that unlock powerful units and abilities. While the graphics are simple, the joy comes from watching your noob horde overwhelm the enemy in a wave of blue and yellow.

War Simulator


War Simulator takes you on a whirlwind tour of history's battlefields. Traverse eras from World War II to the future, unlocking a massive arsenal as you go. Combat itself is a wave-based defense against enemy soldiers. Strategize your approach by upgrading weapons, armor, and even special perks. While the shooting mechanics are simple, the joy comes from mowing down enemies and progressing through distinct historical periods. War Simulator offers a fun, casual experience for history buffs and shooter fans alike.

title: Murder Mystery 2 - Full Guide to Player Roles
image_title: RobloxGo - Murder Mystery 2 - Full Guide to Player Roles
image_alt: RobloxGo - Murder Mystery 2 - Full Guide to Player Roles - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Murder Mystery 2 might not come with many roles but, to play the game proficiently, you have got to know the roles and we’ll be telling you all about them.
content_html:
Murder Mystery 2 - Full Guide to Player Roles

March 4, 2024 by abdullah
>
Murder Mystery 2 might not come with many roles but, to play the game proficiently, you have got to know the roles and we’ll be telling you all about them.

Welcome to the thrilling world of Murder Mystery 2, a popular Roblox game where players are thrown into a mysterious setting filled with deception, strategy, and a whole lot of fun!

In this game, every player is assigned one of four roles: the Murderer, the Sheriff, the Innocent, and the Hero. Each role comes with its own unique set of responsibilities and challenges, making every round an exciting adventure. Having a good time in Murder Mystery 2 requires going over a learning curve; the most notable of which is the many player roles. After all, you need to understand what you need to do to have fun.

The Murderer


First up, let's talk about the big bad, the Murderer. This sneaky character's sole mission is to eliminate every other player without getting caught by the Sheriff. It's a high-stakes game of cat and mouse where strategy and stealth are key. What's interesting is that the longer you play the game, the higher your chances of becoming the Murderer, adding an extra layer of suspense to each round.

The Sheriff


Now, onto the Sheriff, the hero of the game. The Sheriff's job is to track down the elusive Murderer and put an end to their reign of terror by shooting them with their trusty gun. But here's the catch: if the Sheriff mistakenly shoots an innocent player, both the innocent and the Sheriff meet a grim fate. It's a role that requires sharp observation and quick reflexes. The percentage chance of becoming the Sheriff is evenly balanced depending on the number of players in the server, keeping things fair and unpredictable.

The Innocent


Next, we have the Innocent, the most common role in the game. As an Innocent, your main objective is simple: stay alive and avoid falling victim to the Murderer's blade. While you may not have the firepower of the Sheriff or the stealth of the Murderer, you play a crucial role in identifying the true culprit and helping the Sheriff bring them to justice. Your chances of getting this role are determined by subtracting your combined percentage chance of becoming the Murderer and the Sheriff from 100%.

The Hero


Last but not least, we have the unsung hero, the Hero. Picture this: the Sheriff falls prey to the Murderer, leaving their gun behind. That's where you, the Hero, come in. By picking up the Sheriff's gun, you inherit their duties and become the new hope for the innocents. Your task is to channel your inner Sheriff and take down the Murderer before they strike again. It's a role that requires bravery and quick thinking, but the rewards are oh-so-sweet.

And there you have it, a rundown of the four thrilling roles in Murder Mystery 2. Whether you're a cunning Murderer, a vigilant Sheriff, a cautious Innocent, or a brave Hero, each role offers a unique gameplay experience that keeps players coming back for more. So grab your magnifying glass, sharpen your wits, and get ready to solve the ultimate whodunit in Murder Mystery 2!

title: Tower of Hell - Tips and Tricks to Conquer Every Level
image_title: RobloxGo - Tower of Hell - Tips and Tricks to Conquer Every Level
image_alt: RobloxGo - Tower of Hell - Tips and Tricks to Conquer Every Level - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Conquering the Tower of Hell isnt for everyone but, we’re here with some tips to help you conquer it.
content_html:
Tower of Hell - Tips and Tricks to Conquer Every Level

February 28, 2024 by Skyrus
>
Conquering the Tower of Hell isnt for everyone but, we’re here with some tips to help you conquer it.

Tower of Hell is a thrilling and challenging game on Roblox that pushes players to their limits with its daunting obstacle courses. Conquering this towering behemoth is no easy feat, as each level presents a new set of mind-bending challenges and death-defying jumps. However, fear not, for we're here to lend a helping hand! With our expert tips and strategies, you'll be well-equipped to tackle the Tower of Hell and emerge victorious against all odds. So gear up, brace yourself for the ultimate test of skill and perseverance, and let's conquer this tower together!

Activate Shiftlock


First things first, let's talk about camera control. Activating shiftlock is your ticket to smoother navigation through the treacherous terrain. By locking your camera in place, you can easily adjust your view to better gauge your jumps and landings. Trust me, mastering shiftlock will make all the difference between a graceful ascent and a clumsy tumble.

Concentration


Next up, let's discuss the power of concentration. In the Tower of Hell, focus is your greatest ally. Tune out distractions, silence the chatter, and channel your inner Zen master as you navigate each perilous platform. One moment of lost concentration could spell disaster, so keep your eyes on the prize and your mind in the game.

Practicing again and again


Practice makes perfect, they say, and nowhere is this truer than in the Tower of Hell. Take the time to familiarize yourself with each level, honing your skills and mastering the art of precision jumping. Repetition may seem tedious, but trust me, it's the key to unlocking your full potential and conquering even the most daunting obstacles.

Using shortcuts


Now, let's talk shortcuts. Every seasoned adventurer knows that the shortest path isn't always the easiest. Look for clever shortcuts and hidden passages that can shave precious seconds off your time. But remember, shortcuts come with their own set of challenges, so tread carefully and proceed with caution.

Don’t Laugh, Avoid Karma


Ah, but here's a golden rule to live by: never laugh at your fellow climbers. Karma has a funny way of evening the playing field, and what goes around often comes around. Instead, offer a helping hand to those in need, and you may just find the favor returned when you least expect it.

Don’t add Mutators


Mutators may seem tempting, but resist the urge to add them to your climb. These devious modifiers can turn a routine ascent into a nightmarish gauntlet of chaos and confusion. Stick to the basics, trust in your abilities, and you'll emerge victorious in the end.

Use the ladder for quickstart


When it comes to starting quick, remember this little trick: use the ladder instead of the stairs. It may seem counterintuitive, but climbing the ladder can shave precious milliseconds off your time, giving you a head start on the competition. Trust me, every second counts in the Tower of Hell.

So there you have it, fellow adventurers, a treasure trove of tips to help you conquer the Tower of Hell and emerge victorious against all odds. Remember, it's not just about reaching the top, but the journey you take to get there. So strap in, hold tight, and may the Tower of Hell tremble beneath your feet!

title: Adopt Me Easter Event 2024 - How to Get Striped Eggy and Other Pets
image_title: RobloxGo - Adopt Me Easter Event 2024 - How to Get Striped Eggy and Other Pets
image_alt: RobloxGo - Adopt Me Easter Event 2024 - How to Get Striped Eggy and Other Pets - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Learn everything there is to know about Adopt Me's Easter event!
content_html:
Adopt Me Easter Event 2024 - How to Get Striped Eggy and Other Pets

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
Learn everything there is to know about Adopt Me's Easter event!

Our very own staff has decided to take a crack at Adopt Me’s recently launched Easter Event for 2024 and has been racking up quite the stash of eggs. Here’s everything you need to know about the event, and you might just be that lucky one to win the Legendary Striped Eggy pet! All about the Easter Event This highly anticipated Easter event has just launched in Adopt Me on March 21st and will end on April 4th. The event features a brand-new, Easter-themed area along with exclusive Easter pets and items. To get these new pets and items, you’ll also need to gather a new currency - Eggs (duh!) How to Get a Lot of Eggs Quickly in Adopt Me’s Easter Event? There are two main ways to get a lot of eggs quickly in this Easter event. The main way to do so is by playing the Sunny Scramble mini-game that our staff has helpfully shown in the video guide below. The game is very simple to grasp but can be hard to master. In this minigame, you’ll need to catch falling eggs into your basket in 60 seconds. There are 3 different kinds of eggs here: Green circle, Blue square, and Yellow triangle eggs, which give 1,2, and 3 points, respectively. The total number of points you get at the end, with a maximum of 100 points, is then multiplied by 25 to get the total number of Eggs. You’ll also get 800 Eggs by playing the game, and if you happen to be the player with the most points for the day, you can get a nice bonus of 200 Eggs. This minigame is also featured on the player’s Task Board in the form of tasks. These tasks will ask for at least 60 Eggs to be collected via this minigame, and completing them will earn the players 3,000 Eggs per task. There’s also another way you can gain more Eggs – the in-game egg hunt that happens during the second week of the event. Players who play Adopt Me during this week will be able to log in every day to find 6 collectible eggs on Adoption Island. Each egg found will grant the player 200 Eggs, so that’s 1,200 Eggs per day from just this egg hunt if you do manage to find them all. Got Eggs? What can you do with them? The Eggs you’ve painstakingly accumulated by playing event minigames can then be exchanged for various goodies. One of the most coveted gifts is the Easter Eggy Box. Costing 14,000 Eggs per box, these boxes contain a random Easter-exclusive pet that you can get via a gacha system. The pets you can get include the Rare Dotted Eggy; the Ultra-Rare Floral Eggy; and the Legendary Striped Eggy. If you are ballin’ in Eggs, you might want to even grab the Ultra-Rare Candy Cane Snail for a whopping 50,000 Eggs! Of course, for those with plenty of Robux, know that there’s an exclusive Candyfloss Chick that you can buy for 500 Robux as well! Aside from pets, the Eggs can even be exchanged for adorable Easter-exclusive toys like the Carrot Bushel, Carrot Lamb Plush, and Easter Chick Rattle; pet accessories like the Flower Bunny Clip, Easter Egg Friends, Flower Hair, and Cupcake Sprinkle Wings; and the Meadow Barrow Stroller at the Easter Shop.

title: Adopt Me - How to Get Hamsters Fast
image_title: RobloxGo - Adopt Me - How to Get Hamsters Fast
image_alt: RobloxGo - Adopt Me - How to Get Hamsters Fast - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Adopt Me! just dropped a new feature: the Hamster Hunt! 🐹🔍 The hunt is 🔥🔥ON!🔥🔥 Which one will you get?
content_html:
Adopt Me - How to Get Hamsters Fast

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
Adopt Me! just dropped a new feature: the Hamster Hunt! 🐹🔍 The hunt is 🔥🔥ON!🔥🔥 Which one will you get?

Who could ever resist these little fluff balls, with their adorable paws and huge brimming eyes? Well, you can get yourself a super cute hamster in Adopt Me now after its exciting Hamster update. How? To do so, you just need to head over to the Pet Shop and to the hamster enclosure inside, where plenty of hamsters are zipping around the place like miniature daredevils. At the very center, there's a pedestal with a Golden Corn on it. It is the bait you'll need to use to attract a pet hamster, so buy it. It costs 199 Robux. Like you always do with baits, you just need to open your inventory and use it, and the hamsters will swarm around you, attracted by the bait. That said, only one of them will be chosen as your new hamster pet. Of course, there are some legendary hamsters in the mix, aside from the usual - but equally as chubby and cute - orange hamster, namely the diamond and golden hamster. However, your chance of getting the ultra-rare orange hamster is markedly higher at 87.5% as opposed to the legendaries - 10% for the Golden Hamster and 2.5% for the insanely rare Diamond Hamster. There's really no strategy that you can use to increase your chances of getting the rarer hamsters, though. No matter where you throw your bait or which hamster was seen nibbling at it, the odds are the same and are as listed above. Don't have any Robux to spend? Don't worry!! The hamsters and the golden corn bait are both tradable, so you might be able to get one from a friend. The going value for a hamster right now is between a Hoverboard and a Tiffany (check the trading value for the hamster here). Naturally, the golden and diamond hamsters will go for a lot more. Be careful if you do decide to trade, though! Make sure the person you're trading with is trustworthy. If you're unsure, here's a nifty guide to avoid getting scammed in Adopt Me that we've whipped up that might just help.

title: Which Roblox Games Make the Most Money - Full Breakdown
image_title: RobloxGo - Which Roblox Games Make the Most Money - Full Breakdown
image_alt: RobloxGo - Which Roblox Games Make the Most Money - Full Breakdown - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: With the thousands of monetized games currently playable on the Roblox platform today, there are a few who stand out among the rest in terms of earnings and popularity. Let's take a look at a few.
content_html:
Which Roblox Games Make the Most Money - Full Breakdown

December 12, 2023 by jose
>
With the thousands of monetized games currently playable on the Roblox platform today, there are a few who stand out among the rest in terms of earnings and popularity. Let's take a look at a few.

In recent years, Roblox has implemented monetization for its game-creating crowd, thus making the platform more productive and attractive for users of all ages to join. Though Roblox (in all its practicality) is really a platform primarily for kids and the child at heart, many creators have been able to use the platform's block-like graphic environment for almost any game genre in the market today.

Roblox game creators earn by the amount of gamers/users who visit and play their games. With this in mind, there are certain games on the platform that have achieved the kind of popularity that has catapulted their number of visits and thus earnings to sky-high levels to consider them as the biggest earning Roblox games at one time or another. Of course, how much real money a Roblox game earns is rarely announced to the public and is usually considered a private matter between the platform and the game's creator. Regardless, the Roblox community continues to pry and speculate. With that, here are a few examples of the biggest earners in the Roblox universe.

Adopt-Me



Somehow, the idea of having a pet and taking care of it has been a tradition passed down from one generation of kids to the next, and so forth. Kids love animal pets whether they be the usual domesticated variety or even the more exotic ones. What's more, players have a reign with certain creative options within the game. This has led to a huge following and game economy placing Adopt Me practically on the top spot of the list. Since first launched in 2017, the game hovers at around the 77 Million USD/year mark. You can check out Adopt-Me here.

Welcome to Bloxburg


Welcome to Bloxburg is one of the longer-running games on the platform. Basically an adventure game in the city of Bloxburg, the game has gained immense popularity and a huge following through the years. With earnings at over 10 Million USD, the game was said to have been recently sold by its developer Coeptus to the Swedish game and media company the Embracer Group (which currently owns Tomb Raider, Borderlands, and other popular AAA titles) to a whopping tune of around 100 Million USD. You can visit Welcome to Bloxburg here.

Royale High


The game is probably one of the most optimized games when it comes to monetization. The amount of accessories (from dresses to diamonds) in this game is huge. The whole game revolves around buying and selling because the majority of the clientele are young girls in a hurry to grow up to become beautiful women. Royale High as the name suggests is a social game combined with fairy tale elements with very strong magnetic properties to the fairer gender. Being on the platform since 2017, the game has amassed a huge following of its own. If one wants to guess the total earnings of this game, just think of how much Barbie earns. You can visit Royale High here.

Work At A Pizza Place



The game has been around since 2007. If you have ever wondered what it's like working in the Pizza industry, the game can somewhat give you a good idea about it. It's an adventure whether you fulfill the Pizza orders or deliver them yourself. You can use your earnings to build a house, buy gear, and a lot of other cool stuff to acquire. Somehow, this game was able to build up a continuously growing following reaching around 1 Billion player visits. Dued1 who created the game was reported to have earned around 100,000 USD from it. You can check out Work At A Pizza Place over here.

Brookhaven-RP



The game is a derivative of the original Roblox Brookhaven released by developer WolfPaq in 2020. Brookhaven is essentially a role-playing game where gamers can live out their role-playing fantasies in practically any scenario they can think of all happening within the confines of Brookhaven. The game has become very popular since it was released on the platform and has around 34 million player visits to date. Since the game is still new and in the process of growth, one can only really speculate how much WolfPaq has been earning from this. Brookhaven RP is simply Brookhaven for the Filipino Roblox Community which happens to be one of the biggest Roblox player bases the world over. You can visit Brookhaven RP here.
