short_description: Want to grab some exclusive, time-limited freebies for your Roblox avatar, and get all your friends to turn green with envy? You might want to check this out!
content_html:
Where to Find Roblox Codes That Actually Work

August 28, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Want to grab some exclusive, time-limited freebies for your Roblox avatar, and get all your friends to turn green with envy? You might want to check this out!

Everyone likes free things, and the players of the highly popular gaming platform, Roblox, aren’t any different. In this article, we explore the many different ways you can get Roblox promo codes to redeem exclusive, time-limited items for your avatar for free.

What are Roblox codes exactly?

To put it simply, they are promo codes for various Roblox games that are given out by developers of the games you love, or even Roblox influencers and YouTubers who have collaborations with the game devs. You can oftentimes get the codes for free simply by doing something like joining their Discord or following their livestreams.

What do Roblox promo codes do?

These codes generally can be redeemed for a host of free and usually exclusive cosmetic items (accessories) that you can then spruce up your Roblox avatar with, showing your loyalty to the games you enjoy, the events you’ve participated in, and the Roblox influencers you support.

Where can I get Roblox codes?

Here comes the big question - where can I get Roblox codes? Well, generally, there are multiple ways you can do so. We’ll cover each of them in detail below: 1. Follow the various socials of your favorite Roblox games One of the easiest ways to get free promo codes for the games you love to play in Roblox is simply by following all the socials, whether it is Discord, Twitch, X (formerly known as Twitter), or others. This is because only the developers of their games can generate promo codes for their respective games, and you can get news of all the latest promo codes straight from the horse's mouth, so to speak. However, it’s also wise to follow the socials of Roblox itself since there will be certain events where exclusive Roblox-wide promo codes will be given out. Of course, keeping an eye on these socials is as equally important since most of these promo codes are often time-limited or event-exclusive. Essentially, if you blink too long, you might miss it... Yes, I'm definitely exaggerating here, but you get the idea! 2. Check out external sites that compile lists of promo codes for you The codes that often make it to external sites are usually codes that don’t expire that quickly or at all. These external sites range from the Fandom wiki sites for each of Roblox’s many games to even yours truly, RobloxGo, where we have staff on hand to compile all the latest codes for the month, every month, so that you won’t have to! Plus, we also include a step-by-step for the redemption process so that it’s super easy to redeem all those codes. It’s just a convenient, one-stop site where you can grab all the free Roblox codes and redeem the exclusive accessories you want. 3. Join Roblox fan groups, Discord channels, and community sites where codes for a wide range of games are being shared If you’re a fan of a wide variety of games on Roblox and you just don’t want to follow every single social media for each of the games you play, then joining an active Roblox fan group, Discord channel, and community site might be your best bet! Avid community members of such groups will often share any code they come across, usually complete with a general guide on how to redeem the codes, to other members within their circle. Not to mention, unlike external sites, you can get up-to-date promo code information more quickly this way, which is especially helpful for very time-limited codes. This also includes following certain Roblox YouTubers and influencers, especially the “big names” since they are more likely to gain early intel on any exciting new promo codes, thanks to their closer connection to the Roblox team and even the developers of popular Roblox games, that you can then grab.

How to redeem Roblox codes?

We've provided a general guide here that you can follow for the redemption of Roblox codes that aren't specifically associated with any game on Roblox. 1. Log in your Roblox account 2.Go to Redeem Roblox Codes 3. Enter your code in the box. 4. Click Redeem. 5. Check your inventory to ensure that the item is there. However, note that for game-specific codes, different Roblox games will have a redemption process that may differ widely. If you check out our monthly Roblox Promo Codes posts, you should be able to find specially tailored step-by-step for each of the game codes we feature. All in all, if you’re determined to collect and redeem all the Roblox promo codes you can get your hands on, these are the few general ways you can do so. It can be tedious sometimes, but the effort is definitely worth it, especially when you see the look on your friends’ faces when they notice you’ve managed to snag a highly-exclusive accessory, thanks in part to your diligence, to RobloxGo, and to this article! You’re welcome!

title: How to Maximize Your Profits as a Roblox Creator
image_title: RobloxGo - How to Maximize Your Profits as a Roblox Creator
image_alt: RobloxGo - How to Maximize Your Profits as a Roblox Creator - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Creating content in Roblox offers many avenues. Ready to delve into the world of paid creator content? Here are a few pointers to remember.
content_html:
How to Maximize Your Profits as a Roblox Creator

May 15, 2023 by JamesVince
>
Creating content in Roblox offers many avenues. Ready to delve into the world of paid creator content? Here are a few pointers to remember.

By now, it’s an open secret that you can make serious real-world money out of creating an Experience in Roblox. No, putting menus to vend content everywhere in your game world is not going to cut it. You can’t sell when you don’t give players a reason to buy. And there’s proof that you can make good money from making Roblox games. The five top-earning Experiences of 2022 are 1) Adopt Me! 2) Pet Simulator X! 3) Blox Fruits 4) Welcome to Bloxburg, and 5) BedWars, which made around a few million yearly. That must have gotten you excited huh? So, what should you, a starting creator, do to maximize profit on Roblox?

Get all the needed requirements

Thinking of jumping over to the ‘good stuff’ without covering the basics first? Not possible if you don’t even have the means to convert your potential Robux earnings to profit. The first of these steps is to sign up for a Developer Exchange account. With this, a game creator can cash out earned game currency at a set rate. You currently get 350 USD for every 100,000 earned Robux. Just make sure you have the other requirements for cashing out: - A Roblox Premium Subscription - At least 100,000 earned Robux in your account - A verified email address - A valid DevEx portal account - Be 13 years of age or older - Have a good standing in the Roblox community

Make use of paid services

You’ll have to set your content apart from the usual free-to-play Experiences found in the game. Setting player expectations that your Experience is a different, better game than the rest is as easy as charging for game access. Another good monetization method is through the use of Game Passes. There’s hardly a player who could resist a ton of goodies to earn over a one-time charge. Let your consumer base earn more rewards by playing through content. Striking a balance with game passes is going to be your challenge. Making your experience too dependent on them will put your game in the pay-to-win category. Leaving too few or few advantages makes them not worth spending. Some single-use game items like ingredients or consumables can be factored in when setting up monetization. Here, you can opt for a pay-for-convenience model, whether in the form of item drop improvements or outright selling the items through packages. Take note that these should not be difficult or impossible for non-paying players to obtain yet offers tempting relief to those who can afford to buy them. There's another point to remember. You've got to make the community feel the Robux is going somewhere nice, like tweaked content, constant updates, and active advertisements for your game.

Offer fashion items

The desire for a more personalized look has given online dress-up quite the sales boost. Whether freemium or premium, there will always be a demand for appearances that highlight player tastes. A few pieces of avatar apparel that can be mixed and matched is a good start for gamers to feel at home when playing your Experience. Dressing up avatars has been trendy for years, and there’s no sign of it stopping yet. These are pretty general guidelines but are no doubt a good point to start with your Creator journey in Roblox

title: SCP in Roblox - Everything You Need to Know
image_title: RobloxGo - SCP in Roblox - Everything You Need to Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - SCP in Roblox - Everything You Need to Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Curious about what SCP in Roblox is all about? Well, we're here to save you the trouble of going down the rabbit hole yourself with this deep-dive article!
content_html:
SCP in Roblox - Everything You Need to Know

August 9, 2023 by Aethyna
>
Curious about what SCP in Roblox is all about? Well, we're here to save you the trouble of going down the rabbit hole yourself with this deep-dive article!

The SCP stories and universe have always had a relatively fringe community of passionate writers and fans before gaining a bit of the spotlight among major media outlets like CNET in 2013. Since then, its community has considerably ballooned, attracting many creative individuals and fans who then go on to create notable works based on the SCP universe, including creating one of the most popular games on Roblox. We’ll take a deep dive into the topic in this article in hopes of helping you learn more about the SCP in Roblox. Here’s “Everything You Need to Know about SCP in Roblox”!

What is the SCP or the SCP Foundation?

If you’re entirely new to the SCP, then you might appreciate a little background here. Simply put, the SCP or the SCP Foundation is a collaborative fiction project on the wiki-like website SCP Wiki.

Much like the agents in either Men-in-Black or Marvel’s S.H.I.E.L.D. to some extent, or even the agents in Warehouse 13 or the Librarians, the SCP Foundation is a secretive organization that is involved in the securement and containment of oftentimes horrific and powerful anomalies known as SCPs, all in the hopes of protecting the general public from the horrors that could have been unleashed. The protection doesn’t only include physical protection, but also from a knowledge perspective since secrecy and being discreet about their operations is kind of like their whole thing. The Foundation will do whatever it takes to protect the world from the SCPs. This includes carrying out dubious, unethical, and sometimes downright inhumane experiments in the name of the greater good, such as using D-class personnel, a.k.a. prisoners from prisons all around the world, as (usually unwilling) human test subjects to learn more about the abilities of an SCP, and how the scientists at the Foundation could use the knowledge to improve the current containment methods for that specific SCP. Note that although not all SCPs are hostile in nature, the friendlier ones are few and far between, amounting to only a handful out of the total number of SCPs cataloged and classified so far. Besides thousands of stories about the Foundation, the wiki also houses a massive database of “Special Containment Procedures” that were written by volunteers and contributors to the site, often in a deadpan, factual, and scientific manner, much like a research report, complete with illustrations and even photos of the purported location where the SCP was encountered, or supposed dissected parts of the contained SCP. The very first “case file on SCP-173” was uploaded by an anonymous user, who was later identified as Wesley "Moto42" Williams. Since then, the database of case files has ballooned, covering detailed “containment procedures” and previous encounters with over 7000 unique SCPs. The stories, case files, and the SCP universe (as well as the inverse and outverse) have attracted an enormous fan base, with many of them going on to create unique fan-driven works, including books, comics, video games, as well as animated and live-action short films.

What is the SCP in Roblox?

Now, back to Roblox! What is “SCP in Roblox”? Well, it usually refers to the game, SCP: Roleplay, which you can play for free on Roblox. Developed by “SCP | Roleplay Community”, this role-playing game puts players into the terrifying SCP world where they can take on different roles within a typical SCP research facility, ranging from being a Class-D prisoner to being a guard or a scientist.

The gameplay primarily includes conducting tests on anomalous entities brought in by the Foundation’s many agents, defending the facility from raiders, fighting off riots among the prisoners who are being confined almost like cattle for slaughter there, re-containing breached (escaped) SCPs, and more. There's plenty going on here, and you’ll need to work with other players (mainly through the use of the radio) to enjoy the whole role-playing experience. Of course, since the game has exploded in popularity, there have been many “spin-offs”, though not all were developed by the original creators. This includes SCP: Site Roleplay, SCP Games and SCP Monsters, SCP: TASK FORCE, SCP: Anomaly Breach 2, and more. There are many more SCP-related games that you can find on RobloxGo as well. On a side note, if you’re interested to learn more about the SCP in general, the official SCP wiki is the best place to visit, but if you just want to immerse yourself in the universe by playing a game, you might want to look up SCP in Roblox!

title: How to Earn Free Robux Using Legit Methods
image_title: RobloxGo - How to Earn Free Robux Using Legit Methods
image_alt: RobloxGo - How to Earn Free Robux Using Legit Methods - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Everyone needs some Robux, the in-game currency, to spend in order to buy items in Roblox. So come take a peek at our list of the legit methods that you can use to earn yourself some Robux for free.
content_html:
How to Earn Free Robux Using Legit Methods

May 15, 2023 by JonPH
>
Everyone needs some Robux, the in-game currency, to spend in order to buy items in Roblox. So come take a peek at our list of the legit methods that you can use to earn yourself some Robux for free.

You can enjoy playing Roblox without spending real-life money, but some items or features require Robux. However, various options are available to earn Robux legitimately, which is excellent news for those who cannot afford them. Without further delay, let's dive in!

1. Create worlds for other players to use or build a game with in-game purchases.

When you create a world that others genuinely enjoy playing, some users may choose to support you by purchasing items or features available through in-app purchases. By providing content that players love, you can be rewarded by loyal fans.

2. Receive giveaways from Roblox YouTubers or Influencers.

Some people, such as Roblox YouTubers or Influencers, offer giveaways to their subscribers or followers to increase their views and likes. While winning will depend on chance, you still have a chance to be selected and win a generous amount of Robux. Pray to the gods of luck and hope to be chosen as the lucky prize winner.

3. Get Free Robux with Microsoft Edge.

This is a great option just by signing up for the Microsoft Rewards program and using Microsoft Edge as your go-to browser when doing your searches. You can get reward points from Bing, and you can also get more by completing quizzes, polls, etc. if you are using their dashboard. Just check it out here and read up on the details.

4. Joining the Builders Club can get you a Robux stipend.

The Builders Club or BC has a lot of rewards you can receive when you choose to sign-up for them. Take note that there is a fee to join them, but the amount of Robux you receive in return and the various features you can avail of make it an excellent deal for everyone. There are three membership types, and depending on which one you have chosen will let you unlock the beautiful things they offer.

5. The Roblox affiliate program.

This is an excellent way to get yourself Robux whenever you successfully refer someone to the game. All it needs is for a new player to click on the link you gave them, and once they create a new account through it, they will be given a commission. So it's a win-win for everyone involved. All in all, these are just a few methods that you can employ if you want to earn some Robux for free. They can be time-consuming but rewarding since you would get the items and features you wish to purchase in exchange. Also, look for shady apps to download, such as Robux Generators, because nothing like it exists. So try these suggestions and see which can yield the most Robux!

title: Is Roblox Safe for Kids? What Parents Should Know
image_title: RobloxGo - Is Roblox Safe for Kids? What Parents Should Know
image_alt: RobloxGo - Is Roblox Safe for Kids? What Parents Should Know - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: With millions of children using Roblox daily, parents are understandably concerned about what types of games their children are playing, who exactly they’re playing with, and how much money they're spending on the platform. Here, we'll discuss what issues parents should look out for to consider Roblox safe for their kids to engage in.
content_html:
Is Roblox Safe for Kids? What Parents Should Know

April 27, 2023 by Mel
>
With millions of children using Roblox daily, parents are understandably concerned about what types of games their children are playing, who exactly they’re playing with, and how much money they're spending on the platform. Here, we'll discuss what issues parents should look out for to consider Roblox safe for their kids to engage in.

Developed and launched by Roblox Corporation in 2006, Roblox is a massively multiplayer online (MMO) gaming platform that hosts user-created games of multiple genres coded in the Lua programming language - a lightweight, high-level, multi-paradigm programming language designed primarily for embedded use in applications which is quite fairly simple to use that children with rudimentary computer coding skills are able to create gaming environments with relative ease. Roblox Studio (which enables users to create their own game or virtual hangout right in the Roblox server) tools are relatively easy for coding novices from the age of 8 to learn. Most importantly, for children interested in developing their own games, Roblox Studio’s controlled environment provides a non-threatening space to experiment and ultimately succeed in developing a real game. The millions of games on Roblox are free to download and play, but it also allows in-game upgrades and accessory purchases in the form of their virtual currency called Robux, which you can purchase on their Roblox mobile, browser, and Xbox One apps. While purchasing Robux is not a requirement to play—and many players enjoy Roblox without spending a cent— the ability to acquire additional in-game items no doubt enhances the gaming experience as players can use Robux to obtain new clothes, accessories, and gear for their avatar, as well as an upgrade to special abilities, bonus in-game content, and gain access to certain user-created games. The minimum amount of Robux you can purchase starts at 400 for $4.99, but the “exchange rate” becomes slightly more favorable the more you purchase, up to 10,000 Robux for $99.99. Furthermore, you can purchase a premium membership called Roblox Premium (formerly “Builder’s Club”). Premium has 3 paid monthly subscription plans (Premium 450 for $4.99/mo; Premium 1000 for $9.99/mo; and Premium 2200 for $19.99/mo. Each subscription plan also includes additional perks such as, Premium benefits within experiences, exclusive Avatar Shop items and discounts, a Robux “stipend”, and the ability to trade items. Meanwhile, their platform does not endorse any “Robux Generators.” If a person, website, or game tries to tell you there is one, this is a scam and should be reported via Roblox’s Report Abuse system. With so many minors using Roblox, parents are understandably concerned about what types of games their children are playing, who exactly they’re playing with, and if they are spending money on the platform (and if so, how much?). The popularity of Roblox may cause parents to consider if the platform’s multiplayer format and wide-open communication channels are safe for their kids to engage in. Let's find out!

What can kids learn in Roblox?

Roblox espouses “Constructionism Theory,” a theory originally posed by Seymour Papert of MIT Media Lab, which posits the idea that children learn best when they are in the active roles of designer and builder and that this learning is accelerated when they assume these roles in a public forum. Roblox has since been observed to encourage users to engage deeply with building complex structures and solving difficult problems, knowing that the fruits of their labor will be seen and played by others. Millions of children have used Roblox to create exciting, complex universes; build out-of-this-world vehicles, and mold diverse characters, providing a fun, supportive, and educational space where your child’s imagination can thrive. And while the main purpose of Roblox is for kids to have fun; a huge side benefit is its ability to teach kids basic skills in coding, game design, and entrepreneurship – skills that are all applicable to real life, whether it’s applying these concepts to a school project, building teamwork, or even inspiring a career in STEM when they grow up. There are millions of games available on Roblox that you can play with your kids, such as the popular pet simulator Adopt Me!, the entrepreneurial and money management game Work at a Pizza Place, and the community-building world of Bloxburg. With these games, you can help your children develop skills and values such as collaboration and cooperation, socialization and communication, problem-solving, creativity, digital citizenship, responsibility, entrepreneurship, and more.

Community and online

Roblox is dedicated to continually developing cutting-edge technologies to ensure the Roblox platform remains a safe and fun space for players worldwide. Some of the technologies they have put in place to ensure the online Roblox community is secure include: Account Privacy. Users ages 13 and over can customize their account privacy settings. For users aged 12 and under, Roblox ensures extra safety and privacy precautions by automatically enforcing more restricted settings so they can only send a direct message to other users that are accepted as friends on Roblox. Account Restriction settings can limit users to a curated list of age-appropriate games on the platform and prevent them from chatting with non-approved users. An Account PIN setting is also available, which requires a 4-digit code to make changes to the account settings. Avatar Clothing Detection. An automated detection feature ensures that all players are wearing appropriate attire within the avatar editor and avatar thumbnails. Reporting System. Players can report inappropriate chat messages or content by using the Roblox Report Abuse system, located throughout the site and in-game. Chat Filters. Roblox’s state-of-the-art filtering system uses a combination of chat filters—both human and AI moderation—to proactively remove inappropriate content from the platform. Moreover, when a user ages 12 and under signs up on Roblox, they are automatically placed on controlled privacy settings to only send a direct message to other users who are accepted as friends on Roblox. The platform also allows parents to restrict or disable chat entirely throughout the site and in-game by choosing “Friends” or “No One.” In addition, players can also control settings that allow them to block certain individuals from chatting with them on the site and in-game. Finally, as part of their commitment to community safety, Roblox has formed a Trust & Safety Advisory Board comprised of world-renowned digital safety authorities with whom Roblox collaborates to promote a family-friendly, safe and enjoyable environment for everyone.

Is the game safe/appropriate for kids?

First off, parents should make sure that their child registers an accurate birthdate on Roblox to enable automatic filtering and other protections specifically designed to protect children under 13. Roblox has an ESRB (Entertainment Software Rating Board—a regulatory organization that assigns age and content ratings to consumer video games in the United States and Canada) rating of E10+ for Everyone 10 and up for Fantasy Violence. It is also rated PEGI 7 in the UK, with rating details that explicitly say there is no blood. Overall, children can play Roblox safely and enjoyably with little supervision and understanding. And while Roblox proactively monitors the content created on its platform and constantly filters and checks the games that are being created both for inappropriate images and profanity using a team of 2,300 people plus AI; with over 70 million active users a month, some offensive communications or user-generated content do occasionally manage to slip through the cracks. It is still possible for kids to come across inappropriate images and language and sexual content, such as in so-called “Condo games” that often feature adult content, simulated sex acts, images, and language. When cases of inappropriate content arise, parents can take advantage of Account Restriction settings and reporting systems discussed above. Therefore, it is imperative for parents to familiarize themselves with Roblox’s parental controls and consistently monitor their child’s online activity to ensure they are shielded from inappropriate content or communications.

In-game elements to talk to your kids about

With millions of users worldwide and from all walks of life having a platform to create, interact, and communicate with each other, naturally, there will be numerous opportunities for potential conflicts to arise. Fortunately, Roblox allows your child to block and report annoying or disruptive players or inappropriate content. As concerned, attentive parents, you should make sure they (and you) know how to do so. In relation to this, Roblox also becomes an especially apt platform to bring up discussions about online etiquette and privacy, including sharing personal information or passwords online. Concerned about the amount of time or money your child spends playing Roblox? Obviously, parents shouldn’t give their children access to their credit card information. Not only does it make common sense not to prevent them from buying everything to their heart’s content, but Roblox is full of advertising and clever enticements to buy its Robux currency. If your kids want to purchase Robux, you should do the purchasing yourself, set a firm limit on how much money your child can spend, and make sure not to accidentally save the credit card information on their device for future use. Finally, consider using parental tools such as Microsoft’s Family Settings, Google’s Family Link, and Apple’s Screen Time so that you can control exactly when or how long your child is permitted to play Roblox games on their mobile devices or desktops to make sure they get their homework done or don’t stay up past their bedtime.

title: Barry’s Prison Run - How to Escape Easy Mode and Beat the Boss
image_title: RobloxGo - Barry’s Prison Run - How to Escape Easy Mode and Beat the Boss
image_alt: RobloxGo - Barry’s Prison Run - How to Escape Easy Mode and Beat the Boss - Roblox Strategy Hub: Stats, Videos & Power Tips
short_description: Are you a big fan of Barry’s Prison Run, yet you want to escape from it? Well, here’s a guide to help you get started:
content_html:
Barry’s Prison Run - How to Escape Easy Mode and Beat the Boss

October 30, 2025 by morrcahana
>
Are you a big fan of Barry’s Prison Run, yet you want to escape from it? Well, here’s a guide to help you get started:

Prison escape games are one of Roblox’s main staples. There are many prison escape games out there, and one of the most notable is Barry’s Prison Run; much like its contemporaries, the game has a leaderboard where the fastest escapees are displayed. With that said, if you’re planning on giving it a shot, you’ll need to follow a few steps and go through a boss battle. Don’t fret, though; here’s a guide to help you out, and our staff here at Robloxgo has prepared the video showing you the entire process. Escape through the air vent The first thing you need to do is escape through the air vent inside the prison cell. There, you’ll discover a series of platforming challenges akin to a 3D version of Mario, just in a prison setting. There’s a narrow air vent path that narrowly leads to a green button marked by a downward arrow. Press the button and ignore the door in front of it. After that, you’ll go through another series of platforms (try not to fall!). Pick up a couple of coins along the way, and finally, you’ll end up in front of an air vent door and a wrench. Pick up the latter, and smash the door, and head in. Evade the guard through the pipes Eventually, you’ll find yourself in the prison near the guards’ lounge. There’s a guard who looks like he’s had a steady full of donuts - press the green button you’ll encounter and evade him by going left and upstairs. Afterward, jump into one of the pipes and follow the path leading to another air vent. Eventually, you’ll find yourself in a bathroom, head over to one of the stalls, and jump into the hole in the floor. Afterward, you’ll find yourself in a lava chamber with platforming challenges. Other challenges and the boss battle Eventually, once you leave the lava chamber, you’ll face a series of straightforward platforming challenges. After you complete these, you’ll face off against what is undoubtedly your most formidable challenge so far: a boss battle with Gary the Chef. He is an extremely powerful fighter armed with a frying pan and a penchant for swinging the whole thing against unruly prisoners and those who aren’t particularly fond of his food. Thankfully, you can defeat him using an item you can obtain from the cafeteria (which is also the battleground. A Foodzooka, essentially a bazooka that shoots food as ammunition, just hangs behind the food counter; just grab it and repeatedly shoot at Garry as you move backward; don’t let him catch up, and you’ll be able to declare victory immediately. Barry’s Mech Robot and escape After defeating Garry, you’ll once again go over a series of platforming challenges and face off with the final boss: Barry’s Mech Robot. Taking them on is a tad trickier, considering it uses a Gatling gun as its main armament. Thankfully, it is no match for the overpowered Foodzooka in your arsenal, so fire away at its arms while dodging the projectiles, and you’ll win the day. After winning the battle, head over to the nearby prison garage, ride the armored SWAT car, and break out of the gates. The job isn’t done, though, drive straight ahead until you reach a helipad, and voila, just navigate around, and you’ll be able to find yourself in a helicopter. Hop into the cockpit and get out of there. Congratulations on escaping Barry’s Prison!
